1001102028.english: What will happen to T-2 Brownie, who dirtied the battle uniform of the veteran soldier? The anger of a soldier who cannot be discharged falls upon the private. T-2 Brownie!
1001102028.korean: 말년병장의 전투복을 더럽힌 브라우니의 운명은 어떻게 될까요? 전역하지 못하는 병장의 분노가 이등병을 덮칩니다. 브라우니!

1001102031.english: Wedding Dress (Iron Blood Leona of Blood and Iron)

1001102036.english: Leona of Blood and Iron, famous for her pride, has finally accepted you as her partner. The only man to ever see her cold, proud smile, both now and in the past, is you. Are you ready to take Leona of Blood and Iron’s cautiously extended hand and escort her tonight?
1001102036.korean: 프라이드 높기로 소문난 레오나는 결국 당신을 반려자로 인정했습니다. 이명처럼 냉철하고, 도도한 그녀의 미소를 볼 수 있는 남자는 현재와 과거를 통틀어 오직 당신 뿐이겠죠. 레오나가 조심스레 내민 손을 잡고 오늘 밤을 에스코트할 준비는 되셨나요?

1001102037.english: Pack containing Wedding Dress Skin (Leona of Blood and Iron) + 1 Cake, 2 Chocolates, and 3 Lollipops.
1001102037.korean: 철혈의 레오나 용 웨딩드레스 스킨과 수제 케이크 1개, 초콜릿 2개, 합성 롤리팝 3개가 들어있는 팩입니다.

1001102074.english: P/A-00 Griffon, who usually acts aloof but reluctantly decided to become an idol, somehow looks excited. Moreover, testimonies from fellow soldiers say she practices whenever she gets a chance… Though she insists it’s not true, maybe she’s the most looking forward to it?
1001102074.korean: 평소 성격대로 튕기다가 마지못해 아이돌이 되기로 한 그리폰은 어쩐지 들떠보이네요. 게다가 틈만 나면 연습을 한다는 주위 대원들의 증언까지... 본인은 절대 아니라고 하지만, 사실 제일 기대하고 있는 것 아닐까요?

1001102076.english: For the narcissist P-29 Lindwurm, being an idol might be her calling. Produce this self-proclaimed cutest idol who’s aiming for a scandal with you!
1001102076.korean: 나르시스트인 린티에게는 아이돌이 천직일지도 모릅니다. 당신과의 스캔들을 노리는 자칭 세젤귀 아이돌을 프로듀싱 해보세요!

1001102078.english: P/A-8 Blackhound, who always steps back and likes to take care of others, wants to be the star only for you. Don’t miss a moment of her performance on stage.
1001102078.korean: 언제나 자신은 한 발 뒤로 물러서고, 남을 챙겨주길 좋아하는 블랙 하운드입니다만, 당신에게만큼은 주인공으로 보이고 싶어합니다. 무대에 오른 그녀의 모습을 한 순간도 빠짐없이 봐주세요.

1001102079.english: Pack containing Idol Outfit Skin (P/A-8 P/A-8 Blackhound) + 1 Cake, 2 Chocolates, and 3 Lollipops.

1001102184.korean: 아이돌 그룹 스카이나이츠 멤버 슬레이프니르 뱃지 B

1001102208.english: EB-48G Hraesvelgr, who was obsessed with the idol coffin she made herself, was able to become an excellent idol thanks to you. She still seems to hold some lingering attachments, but with you by her side, there shouldn’t be any problems.
1001102208.korean: 스스로 만든 아이돌 관에 심취해 있던 흐레스벨그는, 당신 덕분에 훌륭한 아이돌로 거듭날 수 있었습니다. 아직 미련을 완전히 버리진 못한 것 같지만, 당신과 함께라면 문제 없겠죠.

1001102209.english: Pack containing Idol Outfit Skin (EB-48G Hraesvelgr) + 1 Cake, 2 Chocolates, and 3 Lollipops.

1001102210.english: Fortunately, she avoided the unit song, but practicing choreography for the group song is a struggle for P-22 Harpyia, who is clumsy. Please prepare both mental and physical care so that P-22 Harpyia can overcome adversity and become a great idol.
1001102210.korean: 다행히도 유닛곡은 피해갔지만, 단체곡의 안무 연습은 몸치인 하르페이아에겐 고역입니다. 하르페이아가 역경을 이겨내고 훌륭한 아이돌이 될 수 있도록 정신적, 신체적인 케어를 준비해주세요.

1001102211.english: Pack containing Idol Outfit Skin (P-22 Harpyia) + 1 Cake, 2 Chocolates, and 3 Lollipops.
1001102211.korean: P-22 하르페이아 용 아이돌 의상 스킨과 수제 케이크 1개, 초콜릿 2개, 합성 롤리팝 3개가 들어있는 팩입니다.

1001102212.english: P-49 Sleipnir, who has transformed from a self-proclaimed top idol to a true leader with your help, is waiting on stage. She is a cool idol on stage, but offstage, she’s a producer’s fan, so long-term producing will be needed for her.
1001102212.korean: 당신의 도움으로 자칭 탑아이돌에서 진정한 리더로 거듭난 슬레이프니르가 무대에서 기다리고 있습니다. 무대 위에선 멋진 아이돌이지만, 오프때는 프로듀서 바라기인 그녀를 위해서는 장기적인 프로듀싱이 필요하겠네요.

1001102220.english: May of Doom Queen: Miss Perfect

1001102224.english: Alexandra of Resonance, who participated in the Muscle Queen competition held in May, has a special determination. It’s because she has a special purpose. Are you ready to face her true feelings?
1001102224.korean: 5월에 열린 머슬퀸 대회에 출전한 알렉산드라의 각오는 남다릅니다. 특별한 목적이 있기 때문이죠. 당신은 그녀의 진심과 마주할 준비가 되어있나요?

1001102225.english: Pack containing Musclemania Bikini Skin (Alexandra of Resonance) + 1 Cake, 2 Chocolates, and 3 Lollipops.
1001102225.korean: 공진의 알렉산드라 용 머슬마니아 비키니 스킨과 수제 케이크 1개, 초콜릿 2개, 합성 롤리팝 3개가 들어있는 팩입니다.

1001102234.english: A classroom for young crew members has opened on the Orca. While gathering in small groups to receive guidance from teacher Constantia S2, C-33 Andvari commendably approached you and bowed in greeting. This afternoon, you might also get to see C-33 Andvari’s innocent side, just like other girls her age.
1001102234.korean: 오르카 호에 어린 대원들을 위한 교실이 열렸습니다. 콘스탄챠 선생님의 지도를 받기 위해 삼삼오오 등원하던 중, 안드바리는 기특하게도 당신에게 다가와 꾸벅 인사를 하네요. 오늘 오후에는 또래 소녀들처럼 천진난만한 안드바리의 모습을 볼 수도 있겠는걸요?

1001102236.english: With your efforts Stabilization security inside the Orca, Ms.Safety found a new side job. She makes frequent mistakes since it’s unfamiliar work, but she seems to be expecting something.
1001102236.korean: 당신의 활약으로 인해 오르카 호 내부의 치안이 안정되자, 미스 세이프티는 새로운 부업을 찾았습니다. 익숙하지 않은 일에 실수 연발이지만, 그녀는 무언가 기대하는 모양인데요?

1001102237.english: Pack containing Maid Outfit for Ms.Safety, 1 Cake, 2 Chocolates, and 3 Lollipops
1001102237.korean: 미스세이프티 용 가정부 의상과 수제 케이크 1개, 초콜릿 2개, 합성 롤리팝 3개가 들어있는 팩입니다.

1001102240.english: May of Doom Queen: A Different Experience

1001102244.english: Azaz, who spent most of his days holed up in his room or workshop, entered the Muscle Queen competition on Machina’s recommendation. Though he strikes confident poses and expressions, if it’s you, you’d notice that Azaz seems more tense than usual. For Azaz, who’s worn a suit or loose homewear all his life, a single word from you might be a great comfort.
1001102244.korean: 하루의 대부분을 방이나 공방에 틀어박혀 지내던 아자즈는, 마키나의 추천으로 머슬퀸 대회에 출전하게 되었습니다. 당당한 포즈와 표정을 짓고 있지만, 당신이라면 아자즈가 평소보다 여유가 없다는 것을 눈치챌 수 있겠죠? 평생 슈트, 혹은 헐렁한 홈웨어만 입던 아자즈에게 당신의 말 한마디가 큰 위안이 될지도 모릅니다.

1001102246.english: The S12 Shade model was once used as a referee in the rampant bio-android fighting arenas of the past. If a match dragged on or fighters colluded, they had to face death incarnate right before their eyes. Of course, this form of S12 Shade is also death itself to your enemies.
1001102246.korean: 쉐이드 모델은 과거, 만연했던 바이오로이드 투기장의 심판자로 활용되기도 했습니다. 경기가 지지부진하거나 검투사끼리 담합한다면, 그들은 눈 앞에 강림한 죽음과 맞서 싸워야만 했죠. 물론, 이 형태의 쉐이드는 당신의 적에게도 죽음 그 자체입니다.

1001102247.english: Pack containing Grim Reaper Model Skin for S12 Shade, 1 Special Module, 2 Advanced Modules, and 3 Standard Modules
1001102247.korean: 쉐이드 용 그림 리퍼 모델 스킨과 특수 모듈 1개, 고급 모듈 2개, 일반 모듈 3개가 들어있는 팩입니다.

1001102253.english: We can produce bioroids based on the technology secured by Saman Industrial Materials Sales Office.
1001102253.korean: 삼안 산업 물자 영업소에서 확보한 기술을 바탕으로 바이오 로이드를 생산할 수 있습니다.

1001102266.english: Don’t be fooled by the comfortable clothes, warm CoCo & WhiteShella, and innocent expression. To survive in the cold-hearted world of battles unfolding on a drowsy night, you have to keep your wits about you!
1001102266.korean: 편안한 의상과 따뜻한 코코아, 순진한 표정에 속으셔선 안됩니다. 나른한 밤에 펼쳐지는 냉혹한 승부의 세계에서 살아남으시려면 정신을 똑바로 차리셔야 해요!

1001102283.english: Audrey Dreamweaver, who always prepared clothes for other soldiers, has prepared her own outfit for the swimsuit contest. Watch out for her, who’s become even hotter! This summer could burn even brighter.
1001102283.korean: 항상 다른 대원들의 의상을 준비해주던 오드리는, 수영복 콘테스트를 맞이해 자신의 의상도 준비했습니다. 좀 더 핫하게 바뀐 그녀를 조심하세요! 이 여름, 더욱 불타오를 수 있습니다.

1001102284.english: Pack containing Sexy Bikini Skin (Audrey Dreamweaver) + 1 Cake, 2 Chocolates, and 3 Lollipops.
1001102284.korean: 오드리 용 섹시 비키니 스킨과 수제 케이크 1개, 초콜릿 2개, 합성 롤리팝 3개가 들어있는 팩입니다.

1001102285.english: Eternity, who was reluctant to dress up, entered the swimsuit contest with the active help of Boryun and Audrey Dreamweaver. However, Eternity seems to prefer resting on a tube with you rather than moving around. How about taking a break together with her, maybe sharing some ice cream for a little while?
1001102285.korean: 꾸미길 꺼려하던 이터니티는 보련과 오드리의 적극적인 도움으로 수영복 콘테스트에 출전하게 되었습니다. 하지만 이터니티는 움직이기 보다는 당신과 함께 튜브 위에서 쉬고 싶어 하는군요. 잠시나마 그녀와 함께 아이스크림이라도 먹으면서 쉬는건 어떨까요?

1001102288.english: Pack containing Micro Bikini Skin (Draculina) + 1 Cake, 2 Chocolates, and 3 Lollipops.
1001102288.korean: 드라큐리나 용 마이크로 비키니 스킨과 수제 케이크 1개, 초콜릿 2개, 합성 롤리팝 3개가 들어있는 팩입니다.

1001102350.english: C-77 Red Hood was reluctantly forced to join the swimsuit contest to avoid hellish training and wore such a cute outfit for the first time in her life. Her usual resolute demeanor is nowhere to be seen as she shyly blushes—what she needs is a sincere compliment from you.
1001102350.korean: 지옥훈련을 피하기 위해 반강제로 수영복 콘테스트에 참가하게된 레드후드는, 난생 처음으로 이런 귀여운 옷을 입게 되었습니다. 평소의 단호한 모습은 온데간데 없이 부끄러워하는 그녀에게 필요한 건, 진심이 담긴 당신의 칭찬 한 마디겠죠.

1001102353.english: Pack containing Hawaiian Bikini Skin (BoRyeon) + 1 Cake, 2 Chocolates, and 3 Lollipops.
1001102353.korean: 보련 용 하와이안 비키니 스킨과 수제 케이크 1개, 초콜릿 2개, 합성 롤리팝 3개가 들어있는 팩입니다.

1001102354.english: Though Poi hates getting her body wet, she made a capricious request to swim with you wearing a swimsuit. Audrey Dreamweaver prepared an outfit perfectly suited to the client’s wishes. In truth, Poi is more interested in you than the summer sea.
1001102354.korean: 몸에 물이 닿는 건 싫지만, 수영복을 입고 주인님과 함께 수영을 하고 싶다는 포이의 변덕스러운 요구에도 오드리는 의뢰자의 마음에 쏙 드는 의상을 준비해 주었습니다. 사실 포이는 여름 바다보단 당신에게 더 관심이 많지만요.

1001200369.english: Special ammunition exclusive for Constantia S2's Winchester rifle. &n Increases DEF penetration.
1001200369.korean: 콘스탄챠의 윈체스터 라이플 전용 특수 탄환입니다.&n방어 관통이 증가합니다.

1001200370.english: Expansion missile pod exclusive for P/A-00 Griffon. &n Increases damage against air units and DEF penetration, and increases range at enhancement level 10.
1001200370.korean: 그리폰 전용 확장 미사일 포드입니다.&n대 기동형 피해량과 방어 관통이 증가하며, 강화 레벨 10에서 사거리가 증가합니다.

1001200372.english: Targeting circuit exclusive for Constantia S2's Winchester rifle.
1001200372.korean: 콘스탄챠의 윈체스터 라이플 전용 조준 회로입니다.

1001200373.english: Special outer armor for riot suppression made of new material, exclusive to T-60 Bulgasari. &n Increases attribute resistance, reduces damage taken, and activates movement shield.
1001200373.korean: T-60 불가사리 전용 신소재 테러 진압용 외장 아머입니다.&n속성 저항과 받는 피해가 감소하고 행 보호가 활성화됩니다.

1001200375.english: Target tracking device enhancement circuit exclusive to P-18 P-18 Sylphid.
1001200375.korean: P-18 실피드 전용 타겟 추적 장치 강화 회로입니다.

1001200378.english: Suspicious dietary supplement exclusive to Scathy. &n It is a food avoided by most Bioroids.
1001200378.korean: 스카디 전용 수상한 보조 식품입니다.&n대부분의 바이오로이드들이 기피하는 식품입니다.

1001200382.english: Defensive system OS exclusive to Indomitable Marie.

1001200398.english: A box containing Mini Hachiko of Castling. Helps to not fall easily in battle. &n  &n  – Constantly makes green-glowing meat pies.
1001200398.korean: 미니 하치코가 들어 있는 상자입니다. 전투에서 쉽게 쓰러지지 않도록 도와줍니다.&n&n- 녹색 빛을 띠는 미트 파이를 끊임없이 만듭니다.

1001200598.english: Exclusive new external armor for S5 Gigantes.&nATK increases and Counterattack is activated.&nMade of a new, lighter, more elastic special material, reducing incoming damage.
1001200598.korean: 기간테스 전용 신형 외장 장갑입니다. 공격력이 증가하고 반격이 활성화 됩니다. 기존보다 가볍고 탄력 있는 특수 소재로 만들어져, 받는 피해가 감소합니다.

1001200599.english: Exclusive command-assist frame for Leona of Blood and Iron.&nRecon mode is always active, and effects of command-type passive skills are enhanced.
1001200599.korean: 철혈의 레오나 전용 지휘 보조 프레임입니다. 정찰 기능이 상시 활성화 되며, 지휘 계통 패시브 스킬의 효과가 증가합니다.

1001200612.english: Exclusive shooting control system for K180 Seljuq. &n When equipped, ATK, CRIT, and ACU increase, and AP is gained at the start of each round.
1001200612.korean: 셀주크 전용 사격 조정 시스템입니다.&n장착 시 공격력, 치명타, 적중이 증가하며 매 라운드 AP를 획득합니다.

1001200622.english: Exclusive support exoskeleton for Khan the Swift. &n When equipped, increases Evasion, reduces damage taken, and grants Mark effect.
1001200622.korean: 신속의 칸의 전용 보조 외골격입니다. &n장착 시 회피 증가, 받는 피해 감소, 표식 효과를 얻습니다.

1001200625.english: Exclusive ammunition for Khan the Swift's Lancer Revolver Cannon. &n Effective against Light and Heavy units.
1001200625.korean: 신속의 칸의 전용 랜서 리볼버 캐논용 탄환입니다. &n경장형/중장형 타격에 효과적입니다.

1001200781.english: This is a special directive circuit exclusively for Goltarion XIII.
1001200781.korean: 골타리온 XIII세 전용 특수 지시 회로입니다.

1001200786.english: This is an electronic injection phased array radar exclusively for P/A-8 Blackhound.
1001200786.korean: 블랙 하운드 전용 전자주사식 위상배열 레이더입니다.

1001200789.english: ATK Increase / T-60 Bulgasari Bunker Buster Skill Enhancement
1001200789.korean: 공격력 증가 / T-60 불가사리 벙커 버스터 스킬 강화

1001200790.english: T-60 Bulgasari Exclusive Electrified File Bunker&nIncreases ATK and increases the range and attack area of the T-60 T-60 Bulgasari Bunker Buster skill, changing the attack to electric attribute.
1001200790.korean: T-60 불가사리 전용 전격형 파일벙커입니다. 공격력이 증가하고 T-60 불가사리 벙커 버스터 스킬의 사거리 및 공격 범위가 증가하고 전기 속성 공격으로 변경됩니다.

1001200796.english: This is the command system OS exclusively for HQ1 Albatross.

1001400016.english: It's a Acrobatic Sunny day. On days like this, &n I want to walk in the forest./If I had a diving suit, I could create an underwater garden./About Scissors Lise's work… sorry. &n She tends to be a bit focused…
1001400016.korean: 화창한 날이에요. 이런 날엔&n숲속을 걷고 싶습니다./잠수복이 있다면 바다 정원을&n만들 수 있을 텐데요./리제 언니 일은… 죄송해요.&n언니가 조금 집중력이 좋은&n편이라…

1001400020.english: Your Excellency, I hope you don't &n drop to the level of a T-2 Brownie./Please stay in your place as much as possible. &n What are you talking about? It's for work support./I'm not exactly watching Your Excellency… what &n are you talking about? It's a misunderstanding.
1001400020.korean: 각하, 전, 각하가 브라우니&n수준으로 떨어지지 않길 바랍니다./되도록 자리를 지켜 주십시오.&n무슨 소리입니까? 업무 지원을&n위해섭니다./딱히 각하를 보고 있는 건&n아닙니다만… 무슨 소리십니까?&n착각입니다.

1001400023.english: Sometimes I watch old superhero movies! &n Ah, I think I could do well too…/When bored, I organize the Iron Bug records. &n I need to know who the worst guy is./Actually, I'm more suited to being a police officer &n than a soldier… but is it the same in this world?
1001400023.korean: 가끔씩 옛날 슈퍼 히어로 영활&n보거든! 아, 나도 잘 할 수 있을&n것 같은데…/심심하면 철충들 기록을&n정리해. 누가 제일 나쁜 놈인지&n알아야 하니까./사실 군인보단 경찰 쪽이&n적성에 맞는데… 뭐 이런&n세상에선 마찬가진가?

1001400035.english: Sometimes when I see Captain May of Doom, I do think &n she's really a captain. &n Especially her upper body./Chest fat just interferes with stealth &n and flying./I don't like this uniform. &n How should I say it… why is the chest part &n such an open cut?
1001400035.korean: 가끔씩 메이 대장을 보면 과연&n대장이다 싶을 때가 있긴 해요.&n특히 그 상체./흉부 지방은 스텔스 기능과&n비행에 방해만 됩니다./이 제복이 마음에 들진 않아요.&n뭐랄까… 왜 굳이 흉부 쪽이&n트인 거죠?

1001400036.english: It's a bit boring to just stay still… &n Shall we go for a walk?/Isn't there something fun? &n It'd be nice if an Iron Bug appeared &n at times like this…/I'm bored. So bored! Commander, &n can we do something fun?
1001400036.korean: 가만히 있으려니 좀&n심심한데… 산책이라도&n할까요?/뭔가 재미있는 건 없을까요?&n이럴 때 철충이라도 나타나&n주면 좋을 텐데요…/심심해요. 심심해! 사령관님,&n우리 재미있는 거 좀&n없을까요?

1001400048.english: Bored? Shall I sing the Omega Industries &n logo song for you?/If needed, I can also activate citizen &n convenience functions…/If you need to purchase the expandable &n CT66 Rampart, please contact the Omega Call &n Center anytime.
1001400048.korean: 심심하십니까? 오메가 산업의&n로고송이라도 불러 드릴까요?/필요하시다면 시민 편의 기능&n작동도 가능은 합니다만…/확장형 램파트 구매가&n필요하시다면 언제든지&n오메가 콜 센터에 문의해&n주십시오.

1001400050.english: X-05 Emily is fun. I like her too./Commander… can't you take a rest today?/Alright. I've decided. Today is for playing! Is that okay, Commander?
1001400050.korean: 에밀리가 재밌지. 나도 좋아해./사령관님… 오늘은 쉬면 안됑?/좋아. 결심했어. 오늘은&n놀기로! 괜찮지? 사령관님?

1001400055.english: What I like is singing alone, right?/When I was young, I was locked up. So even now… being together feels a bit unfamiliar./AL Phantom and Wraithy are the same… we were made to use special powers.
1001400055.korean: 좋아하는 건 역시 혼자서 노래&n부르는 거?/어릴 땐 갇혀서 지냈어. 그래서&n지금도 조금… 함께 있는 게&n낯설어./팬텀이나 레이시나&n마찬가지… 우린 특수한 힘을&n쓸 수 있게 만들어졌어.

1001400057.english: Master? Do you happen to know where ‘CS Perrault' went?/What? You like me because I'm fluffy? Where are you going?/Yes! Master, treat me however you like. What shall we do and play?
1001400057.korean: 주인님? 혹시, ‘페로’가 어디로&n갔는지 알고 계시나요?/네? 제가 복슬복슬해서&n좋다구요? 어디 가요?/네! 주인님, 편하신 대로&n다뤄주세요. 우리 뭘 하고&n놀까요?

1001400060.english: My favorite? &n Titan and… &n the snake that Amy Razor Big Sis gave me?/This? Want to try piloting Titan? &n No. I told you, our Titan is delicate./When I'm bored, I make secret weapons. &n What? Of course, it's a secret.
1001400060.korean: 제일 좋아하는 거?&n타이탄이랑…&n에이미 언니한테 준 뱀순이?/이거? 타이탄 조종해 보고 싶어?&n안돼. 우리 타이탄 섬세하단 말야./심심할 땐 비밀 무기를 만들어.&n뭐냐고? 당연히 비밀이지.

1001400070.english: The CM67 Stinger model is used for breakthrough operations./The main targets are &n asteroids./Destruction. Breakthrough. Destruction. Breakthrough.
1001400070.korean: 스팅어 모델은 돌파 작전에&n사용됩니다./주된 파괴 대상은&n소행성입니다./파괴. 돌파. 파괴. 돌파.

1001400072.english: Heavy armor breakthrough S5 Gigantes./Destruction, breakthrough, repeat./S5 Gigantes. Awaiting orders.
1001400072.korean: 중갑 돌파용 기간테스./파괴, 돌파, 반복./기간테스. 명령 대기중.

1001400074.english: Did you know that Magical MoMo stickers &n were once popular? Among children &n they were really popular./Yes~! Momo is by the Commander's &n side? How can I help you?/Fighting bad villains is the destiny of &n magical girls.
1001400074.korean: 언젠가, 매지컬 모모 스티커가&n유행했던 거 아세요? 어린이&n친구들에게... 인기가 정말&n많았죠./네~! 모모는 사령관님 곁에&n있답니다? 어떤 것을&n도와드릴까요?/나쁜 악당과 맞서는 건, 마법&n소녀의 숙명이에요.

1001400079.english: I don't have a moment to rest. I have to prove myself. &n We need to change the way we see non-combat units!/Training again today! To repay Prototype Labiata.
1001400079.korean: 전 쉴 틈이 없어요. 증명해야&n한다구요./비전투 유닛을 보는 시각을&n바꿔야 해요!/오늘도 훈련이에요! 라비아타&n님에게 보답하려면.

1001400080.english: The sisters here are a bit… &n too big to be models. Except for Miss B-11 Night Angel… &n There's a lack of talent?/A little… inspiration is lacking. We need stimulation…/Commander, you'll need to refine Baesun a bit more.
1001400080.korean: 여기 자매들은 모델이 되기엔 좀…&n너무 커요. 나이트 앤젤 양 빼곤…&n인재가 부족하군요?/조금… 영감이 부족해요. 자극이&n필요한데…/사령관은 빼쑌을 좀 더 가다듬을&n필요가 있겠군요?

1001400085.english: S25A Spartan Assault. Specialized in annihilation &n operations./Recording combat data… dummy data erased./Requesting rapid orders.
1001400085.korean: 스파르탄 어설트. 섬멸 작전&n특화./전투 데이터 기록 중… 더미&n데이터 소거 완료./신속한 명령 요청.

1001400086.english: S25B Spartan Boomer. Standing by./Priority to execute orders./Requesting safe distance.
1001400086.korean: 스파르탄 부머. 대기 중./명령 수행 최우선./안전거리 확보 요청.

1001400096.english: What I like… ah! &n Cooked potatoes with salt… mmm~./If only I could perform again in front of everyone… I can do anything!/Miss Indomitable Marie is really uptight. &n She doesn't understand ‘style'… well, it's a bit pitiful.
1001400096.korean: 좋아하는 건… 아!&n익힌 감자에 소금이면… 음~./모두 앞에서 다시 공연할 수만&n있다면… 전 뭐든지 할 수&n있어요!/마리 양은, 정말 꽉 막힌&n아가씨에요. ‘멋’을 이해하지&n못하다니… 뭐, 조금&n안쓰럽기도 하네요.

1001400107.english: Well… a cool leg like this is something little Captain May of Doom doesn't have./Miss Audrey Dreamweaver told me my rivals are Captains Kan and Indomitable Marie./I really like this swimsuit. &n Good thing I consulted Miss Amy Razor.
1001400107.korean: 뭐… 이런 멋진 다리는 메이&n대장 같은 꼬맹이는 가지지 못했죠./오드리 양이 말해주더군요. 제&n경쟁자는 칸 대장이나 마리 대장&n정도라고./이 수영복 정말 마음에 드는군요.&n역시 에이미 양에게 의논하길&n잘했어요.

1001400119.english: How is it? Do you understand a little about the importance of environmental protection?/The Iron Bugs don't seem interested in other animals. I need to investigate the ecosystem a bit more./When I work in the Antarctic or Arctic! This kind of region! It's only natural! Got it?!
1001400119.korean: 어때? 조금은 환경 보호의&n중요성에 대해 알겠어?/철충들은 다른 동물들에 대해선&n관심이 없는 것 같아. 생태에 대해&n좀 더 조사를 해 봐야겠어./나, 남극이나 북극에서 활동하다&n보면! 이 정도 지방은! 당연한 거야!&n알겠어?!

1001400120.english: Days like this are depressing. Boring. It's weather that Constantia S2 sister would like./Aren't you embarrassed when firing missiles? On the contrary, I feel a sense of liberation and it feels good./A few days ago, some Bioroids asked me about exhibitionism. Really… Have they never seen exhibitionism? Or do they have a conscience?
1001400120.korean: 이런 날은 우울하군요. 무료하고.&n콘스탄챠 언니나 좋아할 날씨예요./미사일을 쏠 때 부끄럽지&n않냐고요? 오히려 해방감에&n기분이 좋아지는걸요?/며칠 전, 몇몇 바이오로이드들이&n제게 노출증에 대해 묻더군요.&n정말… 노출증을 본 적이 없는&n걸까요? 아니면 양심이?

1001400121.english: I think it's a waste for P-29 Lindwurm to only fight./Hmm~ P-29 Lindwurm is so cute like this, so why was she born as a soldier?/Would you call me ‘P-29 Lindwurm' rather than ‘Lindwurm'? That sounds much cuter~!
1001400121.korean: 싸움만 하기엔, 린티가&n아깝다고 생각해요./흐응~ 린티는 이렇게&n귀여운데, 어째서 군인으로&n태어난 걸까요?/‘린트블룸’보다는, ‘린티’ 라고&n불러주시겠어요? 그쪽이 훨씬&n귀여우니까요~!

1001400124.english: The sea needs many things. Commander, what do you need?/The Iron Bugs have to be delivered underwater! I wonder what will happen then?/Still, it's easier to find the way now. Long ago, too many people lived, so it was hard even to find a house…
1001400124.korean: 바다엔 필요한 게 많아. 사령관은&n뭐가 필요해?/철충은 바닷속으로 배달해 줘야&n해! 그럼 어떻게 될까 궁금한데?/그래도 지금은 길 찾는 건 쉬워.&n옛날엔 사람이 너무 많이 살아서&n집 찾기도 힘들었는데…

1001400125.english: My mission is to stop the Great Demon King Faucre's conquest of Earth… I have no other interest./Moonlight magical power comes from friendship and courage./Hmph, Magical MoMo doesn't understand the dangers of magic properly. I will awaken her.
1001400125.korean: 제 소명은 뽀끄루 대마왕의&n지구 정복을 막는 것… 그 외엔&n관심이 없어요./문 라이트 매지컬 파워는&n우정과 용기에서 나옵니다./흥, 모모는 마의 위험을 제대로&n모르고 있어요. 제가 그녀를&n일깨우겠어요.

1001400126.english: It was nice during the performance. Hehe. Watching Magical MoMo, Magical BaekTo, and other friends was also good…/Really… I'm not a Great Demon King! Why is even the boss saying that?/I prefer listening to music rather than fighting.
1001400126.korean: 공연할 때는 좋았어요. 헤헤.&n모모랑 백토랑 다른 친구들&n보는 것도 좋았는데…/정말… 대마왕 아니에요!&n사장님까지 왜 그러시는 거예요?/싸움보단 음악을 듣는 게 좋아요.

1001400127.english: There were 970 kinds of Magical MoMo stickers. Even I couldn't collect them all./Magical girls can't stay for long. There is a way… but…/The easiest way to go to the moon is a magic rocket, but the association has banned it.
1001400127.korean: 모모 스티커는 970종이나&n있었죠. 저도 다 모으지&n못했는걸요?/마법 소녀는 오래 머무를 순&n없어요. 방법이… 있긴&n하지만…/달에 가는 가장 쉬운 방법은 &n마법 로켓이지만, 그건 협회에서&n금지시켰답니다?

1001400132.english: Hehe. Commander, you eat everything well, huh? Want to eat one more? Don't worry, there are plenty of chocolate bars here. &n &nIf you're scared, just curl up there. T-13 Alvis will come protect you! &n &nThis one's Vera sister's! This one's T-8W Valkyrie sister's! T-10 Nymph sister said she won't eat snacks because she gained weight! &n
1001400132.korean: 히히. 사령관님은 뭐든 잘&n먹는구나? 이거 하나 더&n먹을래? 걱정 마 초코바는&n여기 잔뜩 있으니까./무서울 땐 거기서 웅크리고&n있어. 그럼 알비스가 지켜 주러 갈게!/이건, 베라 언니 꺼! 이건…&n발키리 언니 꺼!&n님프 언니는&n살쪄서 간식 안 먹는대!

1001400139.english: Faucre stickers? Please wait a moment... Huh? Where did I put the stickers? &n &nMagical BaekTo said… she can't accept a magical girl without magical clothes, so she made Magical Pink Moon Light… Hiiing… &n &nI… feel so embarrassed I want to hide somewhere… &n

1001400894.english: Your Excellency, I hope you do not fall to the level of a T-2 Brownie.
1001400894.korean: 각하, 전, 각하가 브라우니&n수준으로 떨어지지 않길 바랍니다.

1001400924.english: X-05 Emily is fun. I like her too.

1001400934.english: My favorite thing? Titan and… the Snake girl I gave to Amy Razor?
1001400934.korean: 제일 좋아하는 거?&n타이탄이랑…&n에이미 언니한테 준 뱀순이?

1001400944.english: The CM67 Stinger model is used in breakthrough operations.

1001400946.english: S5 Gigantes for breaking through heavy armor.

1001400948.english: Do you remember when Magical MoMo stickers were trending? They were really popular among children.
1001400948.korean: 언젠가, 매지컬 모모 스티커가&n유행했던 거 아세요? 어린이&n친구들에게... 인기가 정말&n많았죠.

1001400954.english: The sisters here are a bit… too big to be models. Except for Miss B-11 Night Angel… you seem to be short on talent?
1001400954.korean: 여기 자매들은 모델이 되기엔 좀…&n너무 커요. 나이트 앤젤 양 빼곤…&n인재가 부족하군요?

1001400959.english: S25A Spartan Assault. Specialized in Annihilation Operations.

1001400974.english: Well... a little kid like Captain May of Doom didn't have legs this cool.
1001400974.korean: 뭐… 이런 멋진 다리는 메이&n대장 같은 꼬맹이는 가지지 못했죠.

1001401013.english: Tch. That kid May of Doom's chest suits an adult like me...
1001401013.korean: 쳇. 메이 꼬맹이의 가슴은 나&n같은 어른에게 어울리는데...

1001401026.english: Hmm... Commander and X-05 Emily... if they fall into the water, who should I save?
1001401026.korean: 음… 사령관님이랑&n에밀리랑… 혹시 물에 빠지면&n누굴 구해야 하지?

1001401149.english: If I go with the Commander… it would be better to be a bit quieter. I’ll let B-11 Night Angel know.
1001401149.korean: 사령관이랑 같이 간다면… 좀 더&n조용한 게 좋겠지. 나이트&n앤젤에게 알려둘게.

1001401465.english: Yes! Magical MoMo is by the Commander's side. How can I help you?
1001401465.korean: 네~! 모모는 사령관님 곁에&n있답니다? 어떤 것을&n도와드릴까요?

1001401491.english: Miss Audrey Dreamweaver told me that my competitors are Captain Khan the Swift or Captain Indomitable Marie.
1001401491.korean: 오드리 양이 말해주더군요. 제&n경쟁자는 칸 대장이나 마리 대장&n정도라고.

1001401688.english: I'd rather build a CT-103 Fortress outside the submarine. Put the rest of the kids there...
1001401688.korean: 차라리 잠수함 바깥에 요새를&n지으면 좋겠어요. 나머지 애들을&n거기에...

1001401733.english: Magical MoMo will always be by your side, Commander. However, you must not forget that, so I will cast a spell for you. You absolutely must not forget, okay?
1001401733.korean: 모모는 항상 사령관님 곁에&n있겠어요. 그렇지만, 그걸&n잊어버리면 안 되니까 마법을&n걸어드릴게요. 절대 잊으면 안&n돼요?

1001401747.english: Hachiko of Castling has a lot of friends. But Hachiko of Castling likes the Commander the most.
1001401747.korean: 하치코는 친구가 엄청 많아요.&n그래도 하치코는 사령관님이&n제일 좋아요.

1001401754.english: What do you think? Commander, please tell me. Do you... like me more than Captain Khan the Swift or Captain Mari?
1001401754.korean: 어떤가요? 사령관, 말해 주세요. 칸&n대장이나 마리 대장보다 제가... 더&n마음에 드나요?

1001401799.english: No matter what, wars are ultimately decided by bombing. That ignorant Khan the Swift, who only runs around physically, probably wouldn't know, though.
1001401799.korean: 뭐니 뭐니 해도 결국 전쟁은&n폭격으로 결판나는 거야.&n무식하게 몸으로만 뛰는 칸&n녀석은 모르겠지만.

1001401810.english: If you need to purchase an expandable CT66 Rampart, please contact the Omega Call Center at any time.
1001401810.korean: 확장형 램파트 구매가&n필요하시다면 언제든지&n오메가 콜 센터에 문의해&n주십시오.

1001401817.english: Just like AL Phantom and Wraithy... we were created to be able to use special powers.
1001401817.korean: 팬텀이나 레이시나&n마찬가지… 우린 특수한 힘을&n쓸 수 있게 만들어졌어.

1001401841.english: It's training again today! To repay Prototype Labiata&n.

1001401858.english: Miss Indomitable Marie is such a stuffy young lady. To think she doesn't understand 'style'... well, it's kind of pitiful.
1001401858.korean: 마리 양은, 정말 꽉 막힌&n아가씨에요. ‘멋’을 이해하지&n못하다니… 뭐, 조금&n안쓰럽기도 하네요.

1001401862.english: I really like this swimsuit. I'm glad I consulted with Amy Razor.
1001401862.korean: 이 수영복 정말 마음에 드는군요.&n역시 에이미 양에게 의논하길&n잘했어요.

1001401864.english: For now, I'll have P-18 Sylphid guard the area around the vacation spot. Once a report comes in, I'll just take care of it.
1001401864.korean: 일단 휴가지 주위는 실피드에게&n경비하게 해둘게. 보고가 올라오면&n없애버리지 뭐.

1001402032.english: Ugh! How could you give up the hat feathers? Miss Indomitable Marie really doesn't know what 'style' is!
1001402032.korean: 읏! 어떻게 모자의 깃털을&n포기할 수 있지요? 마리 양은&n정말 ‘멋’을 모른다니까요?

1001402035.english: I'm grateful to Miss Amy Razor. Hehe... But she said that if things go well, the three of us should meet... I wonder what that means?
1001402035.korean: 에이미 양에겐 고마워하고 있어요.&n후훗… 그런데 잘 되면 셋이&n보자는데… 무슨 뜻일까요?

1001402038.english: Your Excellency, have you prepared appropriate attire? Do not worry. I have already looked into it. I will ask Miss Audrey Dreamweaver.
1001402038.korean: 각하는 적절한 의복을&n준비하셨습니까? 걱정 마십시오.&n제가 이미 조사해 두었습니다.&n오드리 양에게 부탁하도록 하죠.

1001402152.english: It was good during the performance. Hehe. It was also nice watching Magical MoMo, Magical BaekTo, and the other friends...
1001402152.korean: 공연할 때는 좋았어요. 헤헤.&n모모랑 백토랑 다른 친구들&n보는 것도 좋았는데…

1001402153.english: There were as many as 970 types of Magical MoMo stickers. I couldn't even collect them all, you know?

1001402164.english: Count T-13 Alvis needs servants! … About two?! No, I think three would be good!
1001402164.korean: 알비스 백작은 하인들이&n필요해! … 두 명 정도?! 아니,&n세명이면 좋을 것 같아!

1001402192.english: If you're scared, just curl up right there. Then T-13 Alvis will come and protect you!
1001402192.korean: 무서울 땐 거기서 웅크리고&n있어. 그럼 알비스가 지켜 주러 갈게!

1001402198.english: Magical BaekTo... saying she can't accept a magical girl without a magical outfit, and the Magical Pink Moon Light... Hng...
1001402198.korean: 백토가… 매지컬 복장이 없는 마법&n소녀는 인정할 수 없다면서,&n매지컬 핑크 문 라이트를… 히잉…

1001402218.english: Could you please call me 'P-29 Lindwurm' instead of 'Lintbloom'? It's much cuter that way~!

1001402221.english: Hmph, Magical MoMo doesn't really know the dangers of evil. I'll wake her up.
1001402221.korean: 흥, 모모는 마의 위험을 제대로&n모르고 있어요. 제가 그녀를&n일깨우겠어요.

1001402227.english: This is Vera's! This is… T-8W Valkyrie's! T-10 Nymph says she doesn't eat snacks because she gained weight!
1001402227.korean: 이건, 베라 언니 꺼! 이건…&n발키리 언니 꺼!&n님프 언니는&n살쪄서 간식 안 먹는대!

1001402257.english: Don't worry. When we go to the moon, Magical MoMo will be holding you tight, Commander.
1001402257.korean: 걱정 마세요 달에 갈 땐 모모가&n사령관님을 꼭 끌어안고 있을&n테니까요.

1001402261.english: T-10 Nymph just took three chocolate bars, so there aren't any left. T-13 Alvis will get some for you later, so you have to wait patiently.
1001402261.korean: 초코바는 님프 언니가 방금 세&n개나 가져가서 이제 없어.&n알비스가 나중에 구해줄 테니까,&n얌전히 기다리고 있어야 돼.

1001402269.english: Huh? My Vorpal Rabbit? This is a gift from T-8W Valkyrie. There were snacks inside, too?
1001402269.korean: 응? 내 보팔 래빗? 이건&n발키리 언니가 선물해 준거야.&n안에 간식도 들어있었다?

1001402289.english: So, P-29 Lindwurm decided to become the cutest soldier in the world. Therefore, Commander, you have to help P-29 Lindwurm too. Got it?
1001402289.korean: 그래서, 린티는 세상에서 제일&n귀여운 군인이 되기로&n결심했죠. 그러니까,&n사령관님도 린티를&n도와주셔야 해요. 아셨죠?

1001402297.english: If T-13 Alvis is in danger, you have to come help, Commander. You promised, right? Make it happen, okay?
1001402297.korean: 알비스가 위험하면&n사령관님이 도와주러 와야 해.&n약속했다? 꼭이다?

1001402305.english: Commander. I'm sorry T-13 Alvis bit you... Did it hurt a lot? I'll put some medicine on it, so please wait a moment.
1001402305.korean: 사령관님. 알비스가 깨물어서&n미안해… 많이 아팠어?&n약 발라줄 테니까, 잠깐만 기다려.

1001402326.english: Yes~! Did you find the cutest P-29 Lindwurm?

1001402329.english: Ugh... If Magical BaekTo bothers me again, you'll stop him, right? Right?
1001402329.korean: 으으.... 백토가 또 절 괴롭히면&n막아주실 거죠? 그렇죠?

1001402330.english: I'll stick it on your cheek, Commander... Um... it's instead of a Magical MoMo sticker... Do you like it?
1001402330.korean: 제가, 사령관님 볼에 붙여&n드릴게요… 저…&n모모 스티커 대신인데…&n마음에 드세요?

1001402342.english: Commander? Do you want to be Count T-13 Alvis's servant? Then I'll let you do whatever you want!
1001402342.korean: 사령관님? 알비스 백작의 하인&n할래? 그러면 사령관님이 하고&n싶은 거 다 하게 해줄게!

1001402432.english: Master, even if Hachiko of Castling gets heavy later, &n you'll still hold me, right? Right?

1001402457.english: Commander. What is a secret friend? &n T-14 Miho was talking about secret friends...
1001402457.korean: 사령관님. 비밀 친구가 뭐예요?&n미호가 비밀 친구 이야기하던데...

1001402460.english: Surely, Commander, you were drawn to P-29 Lindwurm's &n cuteness too, right?

1001402572.english: Captain Khan the Swift is so cool... Commander, you think so too, right? Why don't you go over and strike up a conversation?
1001402572.korean: 칸 대장님은 너무 멋지셔... &n사령관님도 그렇게 생각하시죠?&n가셔서 말이라도 걸어보시는 게&n어때요?

1001402573.english: I am merely following the will of the former Commander and Captain Indomitable Marie. Please just give me the orders.
1001402573.korean: 전 사령관님과 마리 대장의 뜻에&n따를 뿐입니다. 명령만 내려&n주시길.

1001402576.english: Alexandra of Resonance taught us various things.

1001402592.english: Th-this is my summer combat uniform. T-2 Brownie washed my uniform too, so... Ugh...
1001402592.korean: 이, 이건 제 하계&n전투복이에요. 브라우니가 제&n전투복까지 세탁해버리는&n바람에… 으으…

1001402609.english: This is the nun's habit Miss Cardinal Armand prepared for me. It was a bit tight, so I asked Audrey Dreamweaver to alter it separately. Does it suit me?
1001402609.korean: 이건 아르망 양이 준비해준 수녀복이&n에요. 조금 답답해서 오드리에게 따로&n수선을 부탁했죠. 어울리나요?

1001402616.english: As you know, Commander, my squad members are really fun to tease. Neri thinks I'm always right, and P-3M Undine screams... Hehe.
1001402616.korean: 사령관도 아시겠지만, 저희 부대원&n들은 참 놀리기 좋아요. 네리는 제&n말이 다 맞는 줄 알고, 운디네는&n빽빽 소리지르고… 킥킥.

1001402619.english: It is truly... a beautiful dress. I can only imagine how much effort you must have put into it, Audrey Dreamweaver... It is an honor for me to wear it.
1001402619.korean: 정말... 아름다운 드레스군요.&n오드리 님이 얼마나 고생하셨을지…&n제가 입게 되어서 영광입니다.

1001402628.english: Since Hachiko of Castling is Master's bride now, she will become more mature. Ugh, waaah... If you stroke me like that, I want to be held again...
1001402628.korean: 하치코는 이제 주인님의 신부니까,&n더 의젓해질거예요. 으, 으앙… 그렇게&n쓰다듬어 주시면 또 안기고 싶어져요...

1001402634.english: Your Excellency. There are some snacks T-13 Alvis left in my room... um, there are so many... would you come over and have some...?
1001402634.korean: 저, 각하. 제 방에 알비스가 두고간&n간식들이 있는데… 그, 너무 많아서…&n오셔서 드셔보시겠습니까…?

1001402636.english: If I had my way, I’d get rid of everything else—everyone else—except my younger siblings. But if I did that, I’d be hated by my Master... Hehe, I’m a good Black Lilith, you know?
1001402636.korean: 마음 같아서는 동생들을 제외한 다른&n것- 다른 분들을 전부 치워버리고&n싶어요. 하지만 그랬다간 주인님께&n미움을 받을테니까… 후훗, 저는 착한&n리리스라구요?

1001402643.english: P-29 Lindwurm, who used to be the cutest soldier in the world, has become the cutest bride in the world! ...Hehe, I like you. You are the coolest commander in the world.
1001402643.korean: 세상에서 제일 귀여운 군인이었던&n린티는, 세상에서 제일 귀여운 신부가&n되었답니다! ...에헤헷, 좋아해요.&n세상에서 제일 멋진 사령관님.

1001402662.english: It's hard to run because it's tight and the shoes are uncomfortable, but you like things like this, Commander, right? Hehe, I heard about it from Audrey Dreamweaver!
1001402662.korean: 꽉 끼고 신발도 불편해서 달리기&n힘들지만, 사령관님은 이런 걸&n좋아하시는 거죠?&n헤헷, 오드리 님한테 들었어요!

1001402691.english: I don't like it these days. Everyone's calling me Audrey Dreamweaver, Ms. Audrey Dreamweaver, and Sister Audrey Dreamweaver! What's so special about a swimsuit anyway...
1001402691.korean: 요즘 마음에 안들어.&n다들 오드리, 오드리님, 오드리 언니!&n그까짓 수영복이 뭐라고...

1001402694.english: I thought I'd be able to get a ton of samples if I came here... but with so many Bioroids here, I can't even move around properly...! Eek?! Please don't touch me!
1001402694.korean: 이곳에 오면 샘플을 엄청나게 얻을 수 있을&n줄 알았는데… 이렇게 바이오로이드 분들이&n많아서야 제대로 돌아다니지도 못하지&n않습니까…! 흐익?! 손대지 말아주십시오!

1001402698.english: Magical BaekTo prepared everything so that I could perform the third ritual. Thank you so much— Ugh… I’m so embarrassed…
1001402698.korean: 백토가 제가 세 번째 의식을 치를 수 있도록&n준비해줬어요. 정말 고맙- 으으…&n너무 부끄러워...

1001402728.english: Captain Khan the Swift is taking a bath nearby, too. Why don't you go wash him? As for me… hehe… I'll stay right here.
1001402728.korean: 칸 대장님도 근처에서 목욕하고&n계세요. 가서 씻겨드리는 게&n어때요? 저는… 후후… 여기&n있을게요.

1001402735.english: Sigh, Cardinal Armand is seriously so closed-minded. Making such a fuss over a skirt length like this... every time I talk about it, I feel like my cuteness is leaking out.
1001402735.korean: 에효, 아르망은 진짜 앞뒤 꽉꽉&n막혔어요. 이 정도 치마 길이&n가지고 호들갑은... 이야기할&n때마다 제 귀여움이&n새어나가는 기분인 거 있죠?

1001402762.english: I heard from Black Lilith that there are pests leaving their scent on Master's bed. Hehe... Could you wait just a moment? I'll fill it up with mine soon...
1001402762.korean: 리리스에게 주인님의 침대에 냄새를&n묻히는 해충들이 있다고 들었어요.&n히히… 조금만 기다려주시겠어요?&n곧 제 걸로 채워드릴테니...

1001402766.english: Internal work? It’s nothing compared to the work you’ve been entrusted with, Master. Mr. Cardinal Armand helps out a lot too... Master. It’s okay if you share some of the burden you’ve been carrying with us.
1001402766.korean: 내부 업무요? 주인님이 맡으신 일에&n비하면 별거 아니에요. 아르망 님도&n많이 도와주시고… 주인님. 저희에게&n좀 더… 짊어지신 것을 나눠주셔도&n괜찮아요.

1001402768.english: I was so flustered back then that I completely forgot. Huh? I mean the Knight's Oath. I, Prester Prester Johanna, King of the Crusader, solemnly swear to be my Lord's faithful shield until the day I die.
1001402768.korean: 그때는 경황이 없어 깜빡하고 말았군.&n응? 기사의 맹세 말일세. 나, 십자군 왕&n프레스터 요안나는 목숨이 다하는&n그날까지 주군의 충실한 방패가 될&n것을 거룩히 맹세하겠네.

1001402770.english: I took a bridal lesson...? from Sister Black Lilith! Hehe, she said my hardworking Master would like it if I gave him a massage. How is it, Master? Does it feel good?
1001402770.korean: 리리스 언니한테 신부, 수업...?을 받았&n어요! 헤헤, 고생한 주인님께 안마를&n해드리면 좋아할 거랬어요. 어떠세요,&n주인님? 기분 좋아요?

1001402779.english: W-Makeup? Ugh, P-3M Undine betrayed me! She asked me to keep it a secret…!…I was learning it because I wanted to look pretty for the Commander…

1001402803.english: I asked Audrey Dreamweaver&n to design this outfit. It's super cute, right?
1001402803.korean: 이 의상… 디자인은 제가 오드리&n님에게 부탁했어요. 엄청 귀엽죠?

1001402810.english: Sister Black Lilith has been getting really angry at me lately. So I'm sorry. Master, didn't you give Sister Black Lilith any meat?
1001402810.korean: 리리스 언니가 요즘&n나한테 화를 많이 내.&n그래서 미안해. 주인님,&n리리스 언니한텐 고기 안 줬어?

1001402836.english: Using the data remaining in Robert's body, I have become even stronger! Kuhuhuhu, whether in combat or research, I'm sure I'm the best—Ah, Doctor-chan… H-h-even the HQ1 Albatross model…?!
1001402836.korean: 로버트의 몸에 남아있던 데이터를 이용해&n저는 한층 더 강해졌습니다! 쿠후후후,&n전투든 연구든 제가 최고일게 분명-&n아, 닥터양이… 힉, 알바트로스 모델까지…?!

1001402850.english: T-8W Valkyrie seems overly cautious about her mission... but that doesn't mean my approach is better. I will leave the choice to Your Excellency.
1001402850.korean: 발키리는 임무에 있어 지나치게 신중한&n느낌이지만.... 뭐, 그렇다고 제 방식이&n낫다는 뜻은 아닙니다. 각하의 선택에&n맡기겠습니다.

1001402857.english: T-2 Brownie is a braver soldier than anyone else in combat situations, but... you have to check the direction of her gun barrel frequently.
1001402857.korean: 교전 상황에서의 브라우니는&n누구보다 용감한 병사입니다만 ... &n그녀의 총구 방향만큼은 수시로&n확인해 줘야 합니다.

1001402891.english: Is it okay for me to wear clothes like this instead of my uniform...? Neri and P-3M Undine are definitely going to tease me...
1001402891.korean: 제가 제복 말고 이런 옷을 입어도&n되는걸까요…? 네리 씨랑 운디네 씨&n가 놀릴 게 분명해요...

1001402919.english: Hehe! This T-2 Brownie has nothing to fear now that I am under the Commander's favor. Even Captain Indomitable Marie won't be able to treat me disrespectfully! Hehe, you know I'm joking, right? I have absolutely no intention of using His Excellency's love in that way.
1001402919.korean: 헤헹! 이 브라우니, 사령관 각하의 총애&n를 받으니 두려울게 없지말입니다. 마리&n대장님도 절 함부로 대하지 못 할 검다!&n헤헷, 농담인거 아시지 말입니다? 각하&n의 사랑을 그런 식으로 이용할 생각은&n조금도 없슴다.

1001402920.english: I am sorry, Master. I didn't know I wouldn't be able to handle it. Will you punish the wicked Black Lilith who underestimated your capacity...?
1001402920.korean: 죄송해요, 주인님. 저도 감당하지&n못할줄은 몰랐어요. 주인님의 그릇을&n과소평가한 나쁜 리리스에게…&n벌을 주시겠어요?

1001402978.english: Kuhuhu, today is the day to... the Commander's genes... B-How cowardly of you to summon Miss Vanilla A1 again! Ugh, when will my thirst finally be quenched...!
1001402978.korean: 쿠후후, 오늘에야말로 사령관님의 유전자를…&n비, 비겁하게 또 바닐라 양을 부르시겠다니요!&n크윽, 제 갈증은 언제쯤 해소되는 겁니까…!

1001402984.english: Captain Leona of Blood and Iron is... truly amazing. If I work hard at everything, will I be able to become a cool woman like our Captain someday?
1001402984.korean: 레오나 대장님은... 정말 대단해요.&n저도 매사에 열심히 하면 언젠가 우리&n대장님처럼 멋진 여자가 될 수 있을까요?

1001402996.english: Yeah, I like listening to music. Here, earphones... It's my favorite song. They say P-49 Sleipnir sang it... Let's listen together.
1001402996.korean: 응, 노래 듣는 거 좋아해. 자,&n이어폰… 제일 좋아하는 노래야.&n슬레이프니르가 불렀대... 같이&n듣자.

1001402998.english: Why, why do you keep asking only me… I, I just want Captain Khan the Swift and the Commander to get together…
1001402998.korean: 왜, 왜 자꾸 저한테만… 저, 저는 칸&n대장님이 사령관님이랑&n맺어졌으면 좋겠다구요…

1001403012.english: My eavesdropping is absolutely a secret from Captain Khan the Swift. Make sure it's not! ...Why, why are you laughing...?
1001403012.korean: 제가 엿듣는 거, 칸 대장님께는&n절대로 비밀이에요. 꼭이요! ...왜, &n왜 웃으세요...?

1001403018.english: Since T-2 Brownie did it for me, Commander, you shouldn't scold him too much... You're saying you'll praise him?... Why...?
1001403018.korean: 브라우니는 절 위해서 한&n일이니까, 사령관님도&n너무 혼 내진… &n...칭찬하신다구요?&n...어째서…?

1001403035.english: It seems Miss Cardinal Armand was really cornered, considering she went so far as to ask me for help. But what to do about this... Judging by His Majesty's reaction, it seems to be backfiring...
1001403035.korean: 저한테 도움을 요청할 정도니 아르망&n양도 몰리긴 했나봐요. 그런데 이걸&n어쩌나… 폐하의 반응을 보니&n역효과인것 같은데...

1001403037.english: I was reading a book I borrowed from the Captain. They say it's a novel about human romance... Huh? Ah, the Captain says he received it from P-22 Harpyia.
1001403037.korean: 대장님에게 빌려온 책을 읽어보고&n있었습니다. 인간님들의 연애에&n관한 소설이라고 하는데… 네? 아,&n 대장님은 하르페이아 씨에게&n받았다고 합니다.

1001403041.english: Hahaha, look at that P-3M Undine trembling! Meow~ Ah, here she comes running! I should hide behind the Commander~
1001403041.korean: 꺄하핫, 저기 운디네 부들거리는&n것 좀 봐요! 메-롱~ 아, 뛰어온다!&n사령관 뒤에 숨어있어야지~

1001403058.english: Lately, following Fenrir's lead, Hachiko of Castling also licks me. Thank you all so much.
1001403058.korean: 요새는 펜리르 언니를 따라서 하치코&n언니도 저를 핥아주시곤 해요.&n다들 너무 감사해요.

1001403188.english: I need to fill P-29 Lindwurm with cuteness before it's too late. You know what I need to do, right?... Please call P-29 Lindwurm's name.

1001403207.english: They say the T-10 Nymphs in mythology shared love with the gods. I… sometimes… wish you, Commander, would become my god.

1001403251.english: Please do this for Captain Khan the Swift...

1001403265.english: I'll get caught by Captain Khan the Swift...

1001403306.english: Ugh, Master... Hachiko of Castling, I know now. We're only supposed to do things like this when we're alone, right...? Hachiko of Castling will wait patiently, too.

1001403314.english: Haa, Master... Please torment Black Lilith more. For you, even pain...

1001403488.english: P-3M Undine and Neri probably wouldn't even have the courage to wear an outfit like this, would they? So... you should be a little grateful to me.

1001403499.english: It seems the Lord likes this outfit, so I specially asked Miss Audrey Dreamweaver to make one for me.

1001403505.english: I told them I slept hugging them tightly last night... and the Captain told me to go see T-2 Brownie. Should I give it a try?

1001403512.english: Hmm... Is it time to bring out the Audrey Dreamweaver Secret collection? Of course, the model is… me.

1001403513.english: Senior AL Phantom is superior to me in every way. I am nothing more than an inferior version. But… I will definitely surpass him.
1001403513.korean: 팬텀 선배는 모든 면에서 나보다 우월하다.&n나는 그저 열화판에 지나지 않는다. 하지만…&n반드시 뛰어넘겠다.

1001403532.english: That disc contains old-school animation footage, but... ...M-Commander? By any chance... do you know... Magical MoMo?

1001403570.english: I wonder if using a military grenade as our shelter is okay... Colonel C-77 Red Hood would be furious if he saw this...

1001403584.english: T-13 Alvis, really... dressing my sister in stuff like this... and Commander, if you keep teasing me like that, I really won't take care of anything for you!

1001403639.english: T-10 Nymph said that I could get tons of snacks on Halloween, but what the Commander gave me is enough for me.

1001403689.english: That one tracksuit is enough for my personal time, isn't it? ...You say it's too worn out? Hmm... Alright. I'll go see Audrey Dreamweaver as you suggested. Which one do you think would suit me?

1001403693.english: I think the equipment for the AGS and Bioroids could be improved a bit. As for the Commander's... hmm, I just had a good idea.

1001403707.english: That one tracksuit is enough for my personal time, isn't it? ...You say it's too worn out? Hmm... Alright. I'll go see Audrey Dreamweaver as you suggested. Which one do you think would suit me?
1001403707.korean: 개인 시간엔 그 운동복 한 벌이면&n충분한데요? ...너무 낡았다구요?&n음… 알았어요. 당신 말대로&n오드리한테 가볼게요.&n어떤 게 어울릴 것 같아요?

1001403787.english: The best thing I think I did since coming here was making a vow with the manager, and the biggest mistake I think I made was… seeing the true form of P-49 Sleipnir. Do you remember what was said about an idol being most beautiful when it remains an idol?
1001403787.korean: 여기 와서 제일 잘 했다고 생각하는 일은 매니저랑&n서약한 거고, 제일 실수했다고 생각하는 일은…&n슬레이프니르의 실체를 본 거야. 우상은 우상으로&n남았을 때가 제일 아름답다고 했던 말, 기억 나?

1001403788.english: Kalista helped with the makeup, and A-14B Spriggan helped with the accessories. The Captain chuckled and... told me to give this, this drink... to the Commander.
1001403788.korean: 화장은 칼리스타가, 악세사리는 스프리건이&n도와줬어요. 대장님은 껄껄 웃으시더니…&n이, 이 음료수를… 사령관님에게 드리라고 했어요.

1001403808.english: The best thing I think I did since coming here was making a vow with the manager, and the biggest mistake I think I made was… seeing the true form of P-49 Sleipnir. Do you remember what was said about an idol being most beautiful when it remains an idol?
1001403808.korean: 여기 와서 제일 잘 했다고 생각하는 일은 매니저랑&n서약한 거고, 제일 실수했다고 생각하는 일은…&n슬레이프니르의 실체를 본 거야. 우상은 우상으로&n남았을 때가 제일 아름답다고 했던 말, 기억 나?

1001403829.english: Real milk... um, I can't. Black Lilith-Big Sis would scold me, you know? But Poi is really looking forward to it too, so maybe later… about five people? Nyahaha.

1001403864.english: I... I wish you wouldn't stare at me like that. I'm not embarrassed. How could I be embarrassed? My idolized AL Phantom- Ugh, why are you getting closer...
1001403864.korean: 그, 그렇게 빤히 보지 말아주었으면 좋겠다.&n부끄럽진 않다. 부끄러울리가 없지 않은가.&n동경하는 팬텀 선배의-&n으으, 왜 더 가까이 오는 건가...

1001403994.english: I'm off to take on a A-15 Salamander right now. Do you want to come along? This time, I'm definitely going to take it down and put that smirk on its face!

1001404016.english: Maybe in the past, but right now... I thought Amy would be useless. But... I think I've found a new role. How about being my husband's wife... and the mother of our cute child?

1001404029.english: Oberonia Rhea… yes, it’s all Oberonia Rhea’s fault… If it weren’t for that detestable woman, the Queen, the Queen…. Hehe, I’ll kill her.

1001404031.english: Ugh... What's with this sudden training... T-2 Brownie, go— Where did he go again...?

1001404115.english: Sky Knights' Cutie...? Beauty...? This is a big problem... P-29 Lindwurm has so many responsibilities, I don't know what I should take on...

1001404130.english: Scented with flowers from head to toe! I'm P-29 Lindwurm, the Sky Knights' cuteness and rap 담당~! Hehehe, how is it? I did well, right? I practiced sooo much.
