1001404131.english: I'm P/A-8 Blackhound, the Sky Knights' resident aegyo member. Bl-ha~ I practiced really hard, does it sound weird...? I even have another aegyo prepared specially for the Producer...
1001404131.korean: 스카이나이츠의 애교담당, 블랙 하운드입니다.&n블하~ 열심히 연습했는데, 이상한가요…?&n프로듀서에게는 특별히 준비한 다른 애교도 있는데…

1001404156.english: A shining presence, that is what an idol is… Magical MoMo, ah, no, I will do my best for the fans. Now, let's practice.
1001404156.korean: 빛나는 존재, 그것이 아이돌이니까…&n모모, 아, 아니 팬분들을 위해서 힘내겠습니다.&n자, 연습하죠.

1001404171.english: Oh, have you heard anything about my preferences? ...From Audrey Dreamweaver? Hmm, what should I do~ Hehe, if you fill up this coupon completely, I might be able to tell you~?
1001404171.korean: 앗, 제 취향에 대해 들으신 게 있으신가요?&n...오드리 님한테요? 흐음, 어쩔까나아~ 헤헤,&n이 쿠폰 다 채우시면 말씀드릴 수 있을지도~?

1001404174.english: Magical MoMo...? You're waiting for the show to start? Is that for real? You're not lying, are you?! Alright, everyone. Let's go all out starting from the first song!
1001404174.korean: 모모가...? 공연이 시작되는 걸 기다리고 있다니,&n정말인가요? 거짓말은 아니겠죠?!&n자, 모두들. 첫 번째 노래부터 전력으로 갑시다!

1001404175.english: I'm P-22 Harpyia, the sweet-voiced member of Sky Knights! *Applause*. It finally feels natural now. I really sounded like an idol, didn't I, Producer?
1001404175.korean: 스카이나이츠의 꿀보이스, 하르페이아입니다!&n박수~. 이제야 몸에 뱄네.&n나 진짜 아이돌 같았지, 프로듀서?

1001404176.english: I am P-49 Sleipnir, the leader of the Sky Knights! How about that? I'm flawlessly perfect now, aren't I? I told you being a leader really suits me~!
1001404176.korean: 스카이나이츠의 리더, 슬레이프니르입니다!&n어때? 이제 흠 잡을 데 없이 완벽하지?&n역시 리더가 내 적성이라니까~!

1001404194.english: Mo, Magical MoMo, what are you doing!

1001404225.english: Maybe it's because I've been hanging out with the Commander. It's hard to see the kids these days. Want to go see them together? It'll kill two birds with one stone, like dropping off Amy Razor about our relationship.
1001404225.korean: 사령관이랑 붙어 지내서 그런가.&n요즘 애들 보기가 힘드네.&n같이 보러 갈래? 에이미 언니한테&n우리 관계도 보고할 겸 겸사겸사.

1001404266.english: I am Ms.Safety, your master's housekeeper starting today. Please feel free to call me anytime if you need anything.
1001404266.korean: 오늘부터 주인님의 가정부가 된&n미스 세이프티입니다. 필요한 일이 있으시다면&n언제든지 불러주세요.

1001404274.english: I asked Alexandra of Resonance what they do when they get to daycare, and she said they play house and read storybooks. That's not what I do; I have to manage the supplies...
1001404274.korean: 등원하면 뭘 하는지 알렉산드라님에게 여쭤봤는데,&n소꿉놀이를 하고, 동화책을 읽고 그런대요.&n저는 그런 게 아니라 물자 관리를 해야 하는데...

1001404288.english: You don't have to worry. I decided to go with LRL, Aqua, and CoCo & WhiteShell. Well then, I'll be back!
1001404288.korean: 걱정 안 하셔도 돼요. LRL이랑, 아쿠아랑, 코코랑&n같이 가기로 했어요. 그럼, 다녀오겠습니다!

1001404330.english: Does it look okay? I entered this competition on Machina's recommendation, but... this is more embarrassing than I thought. The outfit is also quite revealing, so it's a bit...
1001404330.korean: 보기 괜찮나요? 마키나 씨의 추천으로 출전하긴&n했는데… 이거, 생각보다 부끄럽네요.&n의상도 노출이 많아서 조금...

1001404352.english: That Spartoia guy— *clears throat*. Spartoia is a problem because he's just too wild. Enough for Ada to have to allocate more resources to battle predictions. Ah, CoCo & WhiteShell is calling. Yeah, I'm on my way~
1001404352.korean: 스파토이아 금마- 흠흠. 스파토이아는 너무&n천방지축이라서 문제입니다. 에이다 님이&n전투 예측에 리소스를 더 할당해야 했을만큼요.&n아, 코코가 부르네요. 응, 언니 가께~

1001404408.english: Audrey Dreamweaver and BoRyeon styled me. Is it okay for a gloomy person like me to look like this... Yes, you say I look pretty? ...Thank you.
1001404408.korean: 오드리님과 보련님이 꾸며주셨어요. 저처럼&n음침한 자가 이런 모습을 해도 괜찮을까요…&n예, 예쁘다구요? ...감사합니다.

1001404421.english: Why are you looking away? Do you think I, Lady Draculina, would care about such things? Go ahead and admire the most radiant Lady Draculina here to your heart's content.
1001404421.korean: 뭘 눈을 돌리고 그래? 이 드라큐리나 님이&n그런 거에 신경이나 쓸 것 같아?&n이곳에서 가장 빛나는 드라큐리나&n님의 모습을 마음껏 감상하라고.

1001404422.english: I guess I should have discussed this with Miss BoRyeon sooner. Thanks to you, I was able to stay by the Commander's side. I should express my gratitude to Miss BoRyeon.
1001404422.korean: 더 빨리 보련 양과 의견을 나눌 걸 그랬나 봐요.&n덕분에 사령관의 곁에 있게 되었으니까요.&n보련 양에게는 감사를 표해야겠어요.

1001404450.english: Audrey Dreamweaver Unnie... made this for me~ ...Huh? You're asking if it's really clothes? There's a zipper here, too. Look. It is clothes, right?♡
1001404450.korean: 이건 오드리 언...니? 가 만들어줬어요~&n...네? 옷 맞냐고요? 여기 지퍼도 있어요.&n보세요. 옷 맞죠♡

1001404458.english: I think I get along really well with Audrey Dreamweaver! We share the same desire to dress everyone up, and our hearts for the guests... Hehe, it's nothing.
1001404458.korean: 저, 오드리님하고 잘 맞는 것 같아요!&n모두를 꾸며주고싶은 마음도 같고,&n손님을 향한 마음도… 헤헤, 아무것도 아니에요.

1001404468.english: Wow, you're wearing a swimsuit too? Did you get this from Audrey Dreamweaver? ...Huh? The saliva? Uh, oh... *Slurp*. I, seeing your body, I couldn't help but... Haha...
1001404468.korean: 와아, 손님도 수영복 입으셨네요?&n오드리님한테 받으신거예요? ...네? 침이요?&n어, 어라… 츄릅. 소, 손님의 몸을 보니까&n저도 모르게… 하하...

1001404580.english: B-11 Night Angel? Hehe, of course I, the older sister, am better. Though she would never admit it.
1001404580.korean: 나이트 앤젤이요? 후후, 당연히&n언니인 제가 더 뛰어나죠. 본인은&n절대로 인정 안하겠지만요.

1001404584.english: Since magical girls exist for everyone, if they end up loving only one man... hehe, they end up looking like this. Gentleman, which Magical MoMo do you like more? Even if you don't answer... I think I know.
1001404584.korean: 마법소녀는 모두를 위해 존재하니까, 한 남자만을&n사랑하게되면... 후후, 이런 모습이 되어 버려요.&n젠틀맨은 어떤 모모가 더 마음에 드세요?&n대답하지 않으셔도... 알 것 같지만.

1001404589.english: A-87 Bansheealways listens well to my stories. The admirable Wraith tells me she respects me. Sigh, I wish you were a little bit like them, Colonel.
1001404589.korean: 밴시는 항상 제 이야기를 잘 들어줘요.&n기특한 레이스는 존경한다고 말해주고요. 하아,&n대령님도 조금은 이런 분들을 닮았으면 좋겠는데.

1001404590.english: How was my performance? I'm Black Magical MoMo, the one who surprised everyone by appearing in the 4th movie! I-I'm a little embarrassed by the costume... but the current Magical MoMo won't be defeated. Because a magical girl who fell into love and became corrupted is strong!
1001404590.korean: 제 연기 어떠셨어요? 극장판 4기에서 등장해&n모두를 놀라게 했던! 블랙 모모랍니다~&n의, 의상이 조금 부끄럽기는 한데...&n지금의 모모는 지지 않아요.&n사랑에 빠져 타락한 마법소녀는 강하니까요!

1001404599.english: Cook, okay. Let's... become corrupted together with Magical MoMo.
1001404599.korean: 쿡, 좋아요. 모모랑 같이... 타락해 버려요.

1001404602.english: If you do this… Magical MoMo might never be caught by the magic again…?
1001404602.korean: 이렇게 해버리시면... 모모는 더 이상,&n마법에 걸리지 않게 되어버릴지도...?

1001404605.english: It's a bit embarrassing to act like this now… but thanks to the gentleman, Magical MoMo can no longer return to being a magical girl… You're responsible♡
1001404605.korean: 이제와서 이런 연기를 하기는 좀 부끄럽지만...&n젠틀맨 때문에 모모는, 더이상 마법소녀로&n돌아갈 수 없는 몸이 되어버렸으니까...&n책임지세요♡

1001404682.english: I enjoy spending time with Magical BaekTo and Magical MoMo, but I am even happier when I spend time with the boss. It is a more brilliant time than ever before.
1001404682.korean: 백토랑 모모랑 있는 시간도 즐겁지만,&n사장님이랑 있는 시간이 더 행복해요.&n그 어느 때보다 찬란한 시간이에요.

1001404694.english: I enjoy spending time with Magical BaekTo and Magical MoMo, but I am even happier when I spend time with the boss. It is a more brilliant time than ever before.
1001404694.korean: 백토랑 모모랑 있는 시간도 즐겁지만,&n사장님이랑 있는 시간이 더 행복해요.&n그 어느 때보다 찬란한 시간이에요.

1001404717.english: LRL! T-13 Alvis! I told you not to run around in the hallway! ...I wish you would take a little bit of Miss C-33 Andvari's example.
1001404717.korean: LRL! 알비스! 복도에서 뛰어다니면&n안 된다고 했죠! ...조금은 안드바리 양을&n본받았으면 좋겠네요.

1001404847.english: First off, Cafe Thetis's menu features hugs, pecks, and kisses. And on top of that—a secret menu? Hmm... If you're that curious, go ahead and order it.
1001404847.korean: 카페 테티스의 메뉴는 일단~ 포옹하고 뽀뽀,&n그리고 키스가 있으시구요~ 거기에-&n시크릿 메뉴요? 흐음… 그렇게 궁금하시면&n한 번 주문해보세요~

1001404862.english: Cia does well on her own. Eating and brushing her teeth, washing her face, and clothes too... Actually, she's not very good at dressing. The clothes Cia wears when she goes out are so hard to put on...
1001404862.korean: 시아, 혼자서도 잘 해. 밥 먹고 양치하는거랑,&n세수하는거랑, 옷도... 사실 옷은 잘 못입어.&n시아 나갈 때 입는 옷, 입기 너무 어려워...

1001404871.english: Captain Jeon, hide Cia! MP is coming to get her! Huh? Hurry, hurry!
1001404871.korean: 전단장님, 시아 숨겨줘!&n엠피 언니가 잡으러 온단말이야!&n응? 빨리빨리!

1001404872.english: Ah! Is today the day Cia grants wishes? Yes. She's keeping up with her last wish. Practicing getting dressed once a day. What is it today? Eh...? Captain Jeon's wish is... for Cia to eat carrots...? Why...?
1001404872.korean: 아! 오늘 시아가 소원들어주는 날이야?&n응. 저번 소원은 잘 지키고 있어.&n하루에 한 번씩 옷 입기 연습하는 거.&n오늘은 뭐야? 에...? 전단장님 소원이…&n시아가 당근 먹는거야...? 어째서...?

1001404874.english: Yes, yes~ You're probably going to order an Americano again~ I knew you would, so I... in advance... What? You're asking if I have time after business hours? Th... of course! Ah, I'm off for the evening shift, so please wait a moment. I should ask P-3M Undine to switch it for me~
1001404874.korean: 네네~ 또 아메리카노 시키시겠죠~&n그러실 줄 알고 미리... 네? 영업 끝나고&n시간 있냐고요? 그...으럼요! 아,&n저 저녁타임 오프니까 조금만 기다리세요.&n운디네한테 바꿔달라고 해야지~

1001404878.english: A snack set... You want me to eat it with Cia...? Th-that... Ah, no! It's not that I don't want to; I just want to give you something in return, but that feels like paying a price, so I really don't know what to do... Would it be okay if it wasn't something material? Then, just a moment... Thank you.
1001404878.korean: 부식 세트... 시아랑 같이 먹으라구요...?&n그, 그게... 아아, 아뇨! 싫은 게 아니라 뭔가&n답례를 드리고 싶은데, 그러면 대가를&n지불하는 것 같아서 대체 어떻게 해야할지…&n혹시 물질적인게 아니라면 괜찮을까요?&n그럼 잠깐만... 감사합니다.​

1001404880.english: That tickles~ Is it fun touching Cia? Cia wants to do it too. Wow, that feels weird... Are men normally like this?
1001404880.korean: 간지러워어~ 시아 만지는 거 재밌어?&n시아도 할래. 와아, 이상한 느낌…&n남자는 원래 이래?

1001404889.english: Cia likes Captain Jeon sooooo much. You ask how much "sooooo much" is...? Ugh... how much, how much... I don't know. I just like him sooooo much, is that not allowed...?
1001404889.korean: 시아는 전단장님이 엄~청 좋아.&n엄~청이 얼마만큼이냐구...? 으…&n얼마만큼, 얼마만큼... 모르겠어.&n그냥 엄~청 좋은데, 그러면 안 돼...?​

1001404896.english: For Cia's sake, something like this is... Th-that not quite right...? Then...?
1001404896.korean: 시아를 위해서라면 이정도쯤은…&n그, 그게 아닌가요...? 그럼...?​

1001404909.english: Master, welcome home. MH-4 Thetis can't live without you… Hehe, are you touched?&nThere's no way I'd say something like this~?&nI don't like it~ I'm not going to do it for you~ you big pervert master♡
1001404909.korean: 주인님, 어서오세요. 테티스는, 주인님이&n없으면 살 수 없으니까… 킥킥, 감동하셨어요?&n제가 이런 말을 할리가 없잖아요~?&n싫은데요~ 안 해드릴건데요~ 왕변태 주인님♡

1001404913.english: Commander, Cia promised to grant wishes...&nCould you grant just one wish of Cia's too...?&nIt's that I want to live happily for a long, long time with the commander I really, really like, Cia, and MP Big Sis
1001404913.korean: 전단장님. 시아가 소원들어주기로 했었는데...&n시아 소원도 하나만 들어주면 안 돼...?&n뭐냐하면… 엄~청 좋아하는 전단장님이랑,&n시아랑, 엠피 언니랑 오래오래&n행복하게 살았으면 좋겠어.​

1001404947.english: Neri is so embarrassed... But MH-4 Thetis, P-3M Undine, and the Vice-Captain are all wearing them, so I can't just be the only one not wearing one... Besides, I heard that the Commander—no, Master—likes things like this...
1001404947.korean: 네리 너무 부끄러워... 그치만 테티스랑&n운디네랑 부함장님이랑 전부 다 입었는데&n네리만 안 입을 수는 없잖아… 그리고&n사령- 아니, 주인님은 이런 거&n좋아할 거라는 얘기도 들었구...​

1001404961.english: Yes, Master. Cafe Horizon's menu includes Americano, Cafe Latte, and— Yes, you want to order something else? What— Huh? That isn't on the menu… Now, please wait a moment. I, I'll consult with P-3M Undine.
1001404961.korean: 네, 주인님. 카페 호라이즌의 메뉴는&n아메리카노, 카페 라떼 그리고- 네, 다른 걸&n주문하시겠다구요? 무엇을- 네? 그런 건&n메뉴에 없는데… 자, 잠시만 기다려주세요.&n우, 운디네에게 상담해볼게요.

1001405049.english: You're asking who I like better, a chocolate bar or the Commander? Hmm... Hehe. T-13 Alvis likes the Commander more! Because being with the Commander makes me happier than eating a chocolate bar!
1001405049.korean: 초코바랑 사령관님 중에 누가 더 좋냐구?&n음… 히힛. 알비스는 사령관님이 더 좋아!&n왜냐면 사령관님이랑 있으면&n초코바를 먹는 것보다 더 행복하니까!

1001405054.english: Whining... I'm out of chocolate bars. Did you run out of what you need, Commander? Hehe. Commander, you know~ Let's go to the warehouse together, secretly, without C-33 Andvari knowing.
1001405054.korean: 히잉... 초코바가 다 떨어졌잖아.&n사령관님도 필요한 게 다 떨어졌어?&n히힛. 사령관님, 있잖아~&n안드바리 몰래, 같이 창고 갔다오자.

1001405059.english: Commander, Commander! T-13 Alvis did a great job, so give me a hug again today! Wow~ You're the best, Commander! Hehe, hug hug~
1001405059.korean: 사령관님, 사령관님!&n알비스 잘했으니까, 오늘도 부둥부둥 해줘!&n와아~ 사령관님이 최고야!&n히히, 부둥부둥~

1001405060.english: T-13 Alvis wanted to be a cool bodyguard like in the movies, too, so Audrey Dreamweaver specially made this for him! Hehehe. T-13 Alvis looks cool, right? Hmm~ but doesn't this outfit look a little small?
1001405060.korean: 알비스도 영화처럼 멋있는 보디가드가 되고&n싶었는데, 오드리 언니가 특별히 만들어준거래!&n히히힛. 알비스 멋있지? 으음~&n근데 이 옷, 조금 작은 것 같지 않아?

1001405064.english: You're asking who I like better, a chocolate bar or the Commander? Hmm... Hehe. T-13 Alvis likes the Commander more! Because being with the Commander makes me happier than eating a chocolate bar!
1001405064.korean: 초코바랑 사령관님 중에 누가 더 좋냐구?&n음… 히힛. 알비스는 사령관님이 더 좋아!&n왜냐면 사령관님이랑 있으면&n초코바를 먹는 것보다 더 행복하니까!

1001405069.english: Whining... I'm out of chocolate bars. Did you run out of what you need, Commander? Hehe. Commander, you know~ Let's go to the warehouse together, secretly, without C-33 Andvari knowing.
1001405069.korean: 히잉... 초코바가 다 떨어졌잖아.&n사령관님도 필요한 게 다 떨어졌어?&n히힛. 사령관님, 있잖아~&n안드바리 몰래, 같이 창고 갔다오자.

1001405070.english: Ugh~ That's strange. I'm sure Audrey Dreamweaver made it to fit T-13 Alvis... Ah, Commander! This button isn't coming off easily now that T-13 Alvis is trying to fasten it. Can you help me?
1001405070.korean: 으읏~ 이상하다. 분명 오드리 언니가&n알비스한테 맞게 만들어줬다고 했는데…&n아, 사령관님! 이 단추, 알비스가 채우려니까&n잘 안되는데, 사령관님이 도와줄래?​

1001405074.english: Commander, Commander! T-13 Alvis did a great job, so give me a hug again today! Wow~ You're the best, Commander! Hehe, hug hug~
1001405074.korean: 사령관님, 사령관님!&n알비스 잘했으니까, 오늘도 부둥부둥 해줘!&n와아~ 사령관님이 최고야!&n히히, 부둥부둥~

1001405075.english: Commander! Hurry and come behind T-13 Alvis! You have to be careful, because threats appear both among people and beyond the camera. Hehehe. But don't worry. I will definitely protect you this time too!
1001405075.korean: 사령관님! 빨리 알비스 뒤로 와!&n위협은 사람들 속에서도&n카메라 너머에서도 나타나니까 조심해야 해.&n히히힛. 하지만 걱정하지 마.&n이번에도 사령관님을 반드시 지킬 거니까!

1001405088.english: I'm going to stick with Master all day today too!&nT-13 Alvis is Master's personal bodyguard, after all.
1001405088.korean: 오늘 하루도 계속 사령관님이랑 붙어다닐 거야!&n알비스는 사령관님의 전속 보디가드니까.

1001405128.english: Oh, I can't help it, really.&nOkay, I'll do it. Ugh... Hehe. Is it good?&nThen... do you want something else?&nCookies, or pie...&nUh, maybe P-3M Undine...?
1001405128.korean: 어, 어쩔 수 없네 정말.&n자, 해줄게. 으응... 헤헷. 맛있어?&n그럼... 다른 것도 먹을래?&n쿠키라던가, 파이라던가…&n우, 운디네라던가...? ​

1001405243.english: Huh? The Reverse Bunny is the most perfect costume in the world. That's common sense, isn't it? Hmm, I overlooked it because you took my side, but as expected, you're still lacking. Now, listen carefully to Teacher NiBA! I will make sure you complete the Reverse Bunny special lecture!
1001405243.korean: 하아? 역바니는 세상에서 가장 완벽한 의상이다.&n상식이잖아? 흠, 내 편을 들어주길래 간과했었는데,&n역시 아직 부족하네. 자아, 니바 선생님의 말씀을&n잘 듣도록! 역바니 특강을 수료하게 해주겠다!​

1001405250.english: How is it? Cool, pretty, the best! Nihihit, this is NiBA's sincere mode, having perfectly embodied the 'Burning Bunny Soul'. ...Hey, King Bunny? Are you listening? When someone speaks, you should look at their eyes, not their heart!
1001405250.korean: 어때어때? 멋있지, 예쁘지, 최고지!&n니히힛, '타오르는 바니의 혼'을 완벽히&n몸에 갈무리한 니바의 진심 모드라는 말씀.&n...저기, 바니 대왕 씨? 듣고 있어? 사람이&n말을 할 때는 가슴이 아니라 눈을 봐야지!​

1001405285.english: This is... the full power of 'NiBA the Bride'...&nTruly the perfect wife...! Nihihi, Commander.&nYou worked hard today. Want to wash up first?&nAs for the meal... it's definitely me, right~?
1001405285.korean: 이건... '니바 더 브라이드'의 풀파워...&n그야말로 현모양처...! 니히히, 사령관 씨.&n오늘도 고생했어. 먼저 씻을래?&n식사는... 역시 나겠지~?​

1001405289.english: I used to be in charge of cargo management and air traffic control at the airport. I joined the Strikers at the recommendation of Prototype Labiata. She must have recognized my outstanding talent at first glance! Ohoho!
1001405289.korean: 본녀는 공항에서 화물 관리와 항공관제를&n담당했었어요. 라비아타 님의 권유로&n스트라이커즈에 합류하게 됐죠. 본녀의&n뛰어난 재능을 한눈에 알아보신 게&n틀림없사와요! 오호호!​

1001405315.english: What kind of service would you like, Master?&nI can do everything except for just one thing.&nI hope you understand that, Cheona...&nBecause I know everything you like, Master♥
1001405315.korean: 어떤 서비스를 원하세요, 주인님?&n딱 하나 빼고 전부 해드릴 수 있어요.&n그건 이해해 주실 거죠? 천아는...&n주인님이 어떤 걸 좋아하시는지...&n전부, 알고 있으니까요♥​

1001405323.english: Hello! I am the Chief of Staff of the Anger of the Horde, trusted by Captain Khan the Swift... Wait a minute, cut. I'll leave Captain Khan the Swift out of the story as usual. Please shoot again!
1001405323.korean: 안녕하세요! 저는 앵거 오브 호드의 참모,&n칸 대장님이 신뢰하는... 잠깐만요, 컷.&n역시 칸 대장님 얘기는 빼고 갈게요.&n다시 슛 부탁드려요!​

1001405384.english: How is it, Master? They say this outfit drives away bad energy and attracts good things! Since they said the closer you are, the better, Hachiko of Castling will stick right by your side today!
1001405384.korean: 어때요, 주인님? 이 의상이 나쁜 기운을&n쫓아내고, 좋은 건 불러 들인대요!&n가까이 있을수록 좋다고 그랬으니까,&n오늘 하치코가 주인님 곁에 꼭 붙어있을게요!​

1001405388.english: Hachiko of Castling has learned how to tell fortunes! Here, just put your hand in the lucky pouch and pick one. Then, Hachiko of Castling will read the slip and tell you your fortune for the year!
1001405388.korean: 하치코, 점괘 보는 거 배워왔어요!&n여기, 복주머니에 손을 넣고 하나 뽑으시면 돼요.&n그러면 하치코가 제비를 보고&n올해 운세를 봐드릴게요!​

1001405392.english: Happy New Year, Master! Hachiko of Castling has filled a lucky pouch with items said to bring good luck. Here you go! Do you like it?
1001405392.korean: 새해 복 많이 받으세요, 주인님!&n행운을 가져다 준다는 물건을&n하치코가 복주머니에 가득 담아왔어요.&n여기요! 맘에 드세요?​

1001405396.english: Haa... Hah! This isn't the time to be doing this. Hachiko of Castling has to... stop... the bad energy coming toward you, Master... Ugh... Hehe... Masteryy. Please pet me a little more... Hwaaaang...
1001405396.korean: 흐아... 핫! 이러고 있을 때가 아니에요.&n하치코가 주인님에게 찾아오는 나쁜 기운을...&n우응... 막아야... 헤헤... 주인니이임.&n좀 더 어루만져 주세요... 흐아아앙...​

1001405400.english: They say this lucky cat is famous for bringing good luck! Besides that, I filled it up with gold coins and fortune slips... but it still feels like something is missing. Ah! Should Hachiko of Castling go in here?
1001405400.korean: 이 복고양이가 행운을 가져오기로 유명하대요!&n그것 말고도 금화랑, 운세 제비랑 가득&n담았는데... 아직도 뭔가 부족한 것 같아요.&n아! 하치코가 여기 들어갈까요?

1001405408.english: Hwaaang...! Master... Hachiko of Castling, my heart is pounding...

1001405418.english: "N2E-888 Arachne, the Spider Queen." Yes, that is exactly what you mean. I have reigned for unspeakable ages, yet I have never met anyone who dared to covet the throne. Will you give it a try?
1001405418.korean: "거미 여왕" 아라크네. 그래, 바로 이 몸을 뜻하지.&n이루 말할 수 없는 세월을 군림해왔지만&n아직도 왕좌를 넘보는 자는 만나보지 못했네.&n네가 한번 도전해보겠어?​

1001405421.english: "N2E-888 Arachne, the Spider Queen." Yes, that is exactly what you mean. I have reigned for unspeakable ages, yet I have never met anyone who dared to covet the throne. Will you give it a try?
1001405421.korean: "거미 여왕" 아라크네. 그래, 바로 이 몸을 뜻하지.&n이루 말할 수 없는 세월을 군림해왔지만&n아직도 왕좌를 넘보는 자는 만나보지 못했네.&n네가 한번 도전해보겠어?​

1001405443.english: Oh! Captain, you're here? CoCo & WhiteShell and AC-6 Hussar forced me to wear this... It... looks weird, doesn't it? Can I go change?
1001405443.korean: 어! 대장, 왔어?&n코코랑 후사르가 억지로 입혔는데...&n이... 이상하지? 옷 갈아입고 와도 돼?​

1001405626.english: I received a lot of help from Magical MoMo. Vocalization, pronunciation, movements, eye contact, background, mindset, and… y… things like dating…
1001405626.korean: 모모 씨께 도움 많이 받았어요.&n발성법이나 발음, 동작, 시선처리, 배경,&n마음가짐 그리고… 여…연애라던가…

1001405628.english: If you, Khan the Swift, were a Keshik like me... would I be able to become like him someday? Like a lone wolf protecting the pack by defeating enemies instead of praying for the safe return of comrades.
1001405628.korean: 칸 님도 저랑 같은 케시크였다면... 언젠가&n저도 그분처럼 될 수 있을까요? 전우들이&n무사히 돌아오길 기도하는 대신 적을 쓰러뜨려&n무리를 지키는, 한 마리의 늑대처럼요.

1001405692.english: This pillow was a gift from A-15 Salamander. I don't know what it is, but it had "Yes" written on both the front and back. Huh? Do you know?
1001405692.korean: 이 베개는 샐러맨더가 선물한 거다.&n뭔지는 모르겠지만 앞뒤로 예스라고&n써 있더군. 응? 그대는 알고 있나?​

1001405696.english: Ah, come to think of it, T-40 Hyena and T-4 Kheshig gave me a scented candle. I put it somewhere around here… Ah. Here it is. Would you like to smell it?
1001405696.korean: 아, 그러고보니 하이에나와 케시크가&n향초를 선물했다. 여기 어디에 뒀는데…&n아. 여깄군. 한 번 향을 맡아보겠나?​

1001405697.english: Prototype Labiata, Lemonade Alpha, the Invincible Dragon… I still don’t know why they follow you. They aren’t the kind of people who would follow simply because they are human… I will keep a close eye on you.
1001405697.korean: 라비아타, 레모네이드 알파, 무적의 용…&n이들이 왜 너를 따르는 지는 아직 모르겠다.&n단순히 인간이라서 따를 이들이 아닌데…&n너를 좀 더 지켜보겠다.​

1001405778.english: I wanted to get Magical MoMo's autograph on the Magical Magical MoMo tube, but I can't find it. What? You said you gave Magical MoMo a different order? Um... in that case, may I get your autograph, Commander? Um... not on the tube, but on my swimsuit...
1001405778.korean: 매지컬 모모 튜브에 모모의 싸인을 받고&n싶었는데 보이지가 않네요. 네? 모모에게&n다른 명령을 내리셨다고요? 그…그렇다면&n사령관님의 싸인을 받아도 될까요?&n저…튜브가 아니라 제 수영복에…

1001405788.english: Why do you keep staring at me...? Ah! Since you like Magical MoMo too, Commander, I see you want to try riding this? It might be a little cramped, but it is perfectly fine for two people to ride. You can come closer if you wish, Commander.
1001405788.korean: 왜 계속 저를 쳐다보시는 거죠…? 아! &n사령관님도 모모를 좋아하시니까, 이걸&n타보고 싶으신 거군요? 조금 좁을지 몰라도&n충분히 두 명이 탈 수 있습니다.&n더 가까이 와도 괜찮습니다. 사령관님.

1001405789.english: Hahaha! How is it, Admiral? The taste of my water gun? It's the ultimate weapon created with the support of T-9 Gremlin and Fortune. Huh? W-wait. Aren't you getting too close, Admiral? … Admiral? Y-hand-to-hand combat is cheating!
1001405789.korean: 꺄하하하하! 어떤가, 제독? 나의 물총 맛이?&n그렘린과 포츈의 지원을 받아 만든 궁극의&n무기지. 응? 자, 잠깐. 너무 가까운 거&n아닌가, 제독? …제독? 유, 육탄전은&n반칙이다!

1001405837.english: Hey, Commander. Have you seen the A-15 Salamander by any chance? He ran off with my bounty money, grinning like an idiot. He said he was planning to use it to pay back what he borrowed from T-4 Kheshig.
1001405837.korean: 야. 사령관. 혹시 샐러맨더 못 봤어?&n걔가 실실 웃는 얼굴로 내 상금 들고 튀었단&n말이야. 그걸로 케시크한테 빌린 거 갚으려&n했다고,

1001405871.english: B-11 Night Angel specializes in dieting, but honestly, it isn't much help. Why? You know it, Commander. How could it be of any help when fat is being lost even in areas where it shouldn't be?
1001405871.korean: 다이어트는 나이트 앤젤이 전문인데&n사실 큰 도움은 못되요. 이유요? 사령관님도&n아시잖아요. 빠지면 안 되는 부위도&n살이 빠지는데 무슨 도움이 되겠어요.

1001405941.english: Are you asking if we are skipping LRL and T-13 Alvis's etiquette training today? Yes, that is correct. When we rest, we definitely need to learn how to relax and unwind. And, and... I would like to spend some time with the Commander as well...
1001405941.korean: 오늘은 LRL과 알비스의 예절 교육을&n쉬는 거냐고요? 네, 맞아요. 쉴 때는 확실히&n긴장을 풀고 쉬는 법도 배워야 하니까요.&n그, 그리고... 저도 사령관님과 시간을&n보내고 싶으니까요...

1001406004.english: C-A concept? Ugh... Space... Great Demon King. Since Goltarion XIII has become a being greater than the Great Demon King, that is what he has to do... Does it... suit him? Hehehe.
1001406004.korean: 커, 컨셉요? 아으… 우주… 대마왕요.&n골타리온이 대마왕보다 더 위대한 존재가&n되었으니 그렇게 해야한다고…&n어울…리나요? 에헤헤.​

1001406015.english: I want to show my true self to my Lord—not a false one, but my real self, not the actor Prester Prester Johanna. Not me, Prester Prester Johanna, entirely.
1001406015.korean: 다른 이에게도 마찬가지지만&n특히나 주군에게는 거짓된 모습이 아닌&n진짜 내 모습을 보여주고 싶다네.&n배우 프레스터 요안나가 아닌.&n온전히 나 프레스터 요안나를.​

1001406026.english: The reason I call you "Human" is... well... I was taught that Bioroids are supposed to love and respect humans, you know? I don't know about others, but I thought it would be okay to love you, Commander... Do not ask any more...
1001406026.korean: 왜 사령관님을 인간님이라고 부르냐면요,&n그게... 전 바이오로이드는 인간을 사랑하고&n존경해야 한다고 배웠거든요? 다른 사람은&n모르겠지만, 사령관님이라면 사랑해도&n괜찮을 것 같아서... 더는 묻지 말거라...​

1001406043.english: Since it is a musical with my Master, I practiced the songs really hard. In particular, the last song is one that Black Lilith composed herself with the help of Ms. Muse. Would you like to listen?
1001406043.korean: 주인님과 함께 하는 뮤지컬이니까, 노래도&n열심히 연습했어요. 특히 마지막 곡은&n리리스가 뮤즈 씨의 도움을 받아서 직접&n만든 노래랍니다. 들어보실래요?​

1001406047.english: “Oh Romeo, Romeo, why are you Romeo?” Hehe, don’t worry, Master. Unlike Juliet, Black Lilith will always remain by your side.
1001406047.korean: “오 로미오, 로미오, 왜 당신은 로미오인가요?”&n후후, 걱정하지 마세요, 주인님. 리리스는&n줄리엣과는 다르게, 언제나 주인님의&n곁에 남아있을 거예요. ​

1001406048.english: Master is the sun, Black Lilith is the moon. No, I don't quite like that line. Because Master and Black Lilith... aren't far apart like the sun and the moon... they will be together forever and ever and ever and ever.
1001406048.korean: 주인님은 태양, 리리스는 달.&n아니, 이 대사는 조금 마음에 안 드네요. &n왜냐면, 주인님과 리리스는... 태양과 달처럼&n멀리 떨어져 있는게 아니라…&n계속 계속 계속 계속 함께 있을 테니까요.​

1001406049.english: Hehe, do you like Black Black Lilith in this form? Please wait just a little longer. Until the curtain falls...
1001406049.korean: 후후, 이 모습의 리리스가 마음에 드시나요?&n조금만 기다려주세요. 막이 내릴 때까지...​

1001406050.english: Oh dear, Master…&nDid you really like the bad Black Lilith that much?&nHehe, then sit for a while upon the throne.&nThe rest… Black Lilith will take care of…
1001406050.korean: 아이 참, 주인님도…&n나쁜 리리스가 그렇게 마음에 드셨나요?&n후후, 그럼 잠시 옥좌 위에 앉아 보세요.&n나머지는, 리리스가 다 알아서 할게요...​

1001406051.english: Empress Black Lilith's throne is made for two.&nThere's always a place left for you, Master.&nBut… wouldn't it be better if it became a seat for three?&nShall we work on that together?
1001406051.korean: 여제 리리스의 옥좌는 2인용이에요.&n주인님을 위한 자리는 언제나&n남아있으니까요. 그런데... 3인용이 되면,&n더 좋을 것 같은데... 같이 노력해볼까요?​

1001406062.english: Deconstructor Azaz made this bed for me. If I press this button here... um... what was it again? Well, I don't think it matters. At most, someone's room will just get flooded.
1001406062.korean: 아자즈가 이 침대를 만들어줬어요.&n여기에 있는 이 버튼을 누르면&n음... 뭐였더라 뭐, 중요한 건 아니겠죠.&n기껏해야 누구의 방이 침수되고 말겠죠.

1001406073.english: You haven't heard my name? That's ridiculous! I may not be quite on Audrey Dreamweaver's level, but I'm a really famous designer! You know that nursery rhyme? Tinker, Tailor, Soldier, Sailor. I'm saying I'm famous enough to have my name in a nursery rhyme! Huh? You're not that Tailor?
1001406073.korean: 내 이름을 못 들어봤다고? 말도 안 돼!&n오드리만큼은 아니지만, 난 정말 유명한&n디자이너라고! 이런 동요도 있잖아?&n팅커, 테일러, 솔져, 세일러. 동요에도&n내 이름이 나올 정도로 유명하단 말씀!&n응? 그 테일러가 아니라고?

1001406074.english: If Audrey Dreamweaver was in charge of high fashion, I mainly designed ready-to-wear. So I know people's tastes very well. Of course, I’ve figured out your taste too, Mr. It’s all about sexy and pretty clothes! Right?
1001406074.korean: 오드리가 하이 패션을 담당했다면,&n난 주로 기성복을 디자인했어.&n그래서 사람들의 취향에 대해서도 아~주&n잘 알고 있어. 물론, 미스터의 취향도 파악이&n끝났고. 그건 바로 야시시하고 예쁜 옷! 맞지?

1001406081.english: Ah, Audrey Dreamweaver sent the pattern. Throwing work at me when I'm so busy—she really is a mean sister... Actually, even though I said that, it feels like a dream to be able to work with the sisters again. It's all thanks to you, Mr. Thank you.
1001406081.korean: 아, 오드리가 옷본을 보냈네. 바쁜데&n또 일감을 던져주다니, 나쁜 동생이라니까…&n사실, 말은 이렇게 했지만, 다시 자매들과&n함께 작업을 할 수 있다는 게 꿈만 같아.&n이게 다 미스터 덕분이야. 고마워, 미스터.

1001406115.english: Neodim, Ms. Echidna, Ms. Brynhildr, Miss Aurora, and Indomitable Marie have prepared a Christmas party. Um... if you don't mind, would you come along? We've even prepared a gift...
1001406115.korean: 네오딤, 에키드나 씨, 브륀힐드 씨,&n아우로라 양, 마리 님이 크리스마스 파티를&n준비했어요. 저기… 괜찮으시다면&n같이 가주시겠어요?&n선물도 준비 되어 있는데…

1001406153.english: - While seeing Benevolent Leanne and her party off and distributing supplies separately for the survivors arriving from England...
1001406153.korean: - 리앤 일행을 배웅하고, 영국에서 올 생존자들을 위해 물자를 따로 분배하던 도중...

1001406155.english: Maria of Redemption, who had tapped on my desk, smiled shyly when our eyes met.
1001406155.korean: - 내 책상을 두드린 마리아는, 나와 눈이 마주치자 배시시 미소를 지었다.

1001406164.english: Due to the schedule, it looks like Ms. Benevolent Leanne and her party will be returning during the week of Christmas.
1001406164.korean: 일정 상으로, 리앤 씨 일행이 크리스마스가 있는 주에 돌아오시게 될 것 같아서요.

1001406168.english: True to Maria of Redemption's caring nature, it was advice that pointed out the minute details.
1001406168.korean: - 남을 잘 돌보는 마리아답게, 세심한 부분을 잘 짚어준 조언이었다.

1001406183.english: So Maria of Redemption and I started planning a party for the survivors.
1001406183.korean: - 그렇게 나와 마리아는 생존자들을 위한 파티 계획을 세우기 시작했다.

1001406185.english: Writing a new plan with Maria of Redemption was a really rewarding and enjoyable experience.
1001406185.korean: - 마리아와 함께 새로운 계획서를 작성하는 건 정말 보람차고 즐거운 일이었다.

1001406188.english: While I was frantically running around looking for a solution after receiving a report that we were short on wrapping paper for the soldiers' Christmas presents... Wraithy spoke to me.
1001406188.korean: - 대원들에게 줄 크리스마스 선물을 포장할 포장지가 모자라다는 보고를 받고 급하게 해결할 방법을 찾아 여기저기 뛰어다니던 도중... 레이시가 말을 걸어왔다.

1001406199.english: Even though Wraithy's condition has improved a lot, her physical condition before was so bad...
1001406199.korean: - 레이시의 상태가 많이 호전되기는 했어도, 그 전의 몸 상태가 워낙 안 좋았으니...

1001406215.english: No. It's A-87 Banshee's turn to decide the menu this week.
1001406215.korean: 안 돼. 이번 주는 밴시가 메뉴를 정할 차례거든.

1001406248.english: But... Wraithy, what brings you all the way here?
1001406248.korean: 근데... 레이시 언니는, 여기까지 무슨 일이야?

1001406355.english: Right... If it's Benevolent Leanne, there shouldn't be any major problems.
1001406355.korean: 그렇죠... 리앤 씨라면 큰 문제는 없을 거에요.

1001406360.english: ...According to the City Guard's policy on searching for survivors, Superintendent Benevolent Leanne and her group will be back soon.
1001406360.korean: ...시티가드의 생존자 수색 방침에 따르면, 리앤 총경 일행은 곧 돌아올 거다.

1001406391.english: Yes. Mr. AL Phantom and Ms. Brunhild went together.
1001406391.korean: 네. 팬텀 씨와 브륀힐드 씨가 함께 갔죠.

1001406409.english: Yes, Feather and Fenrir are off duty this week, so I will be in charge until tomorrow, and starting the day after tomorrow, Black Lilith and Hachiko of Castling will take turns covering the security.
1001406409.korean: 네, 이번 주는 페더와 펜리르가 비번이고, 내일까지 제가, 그리고 모레부터는 리리스 언니와 하치코가 돌아가며 경호를 맡을 예정이에요.

1001406416.english: I think it would be better if people who can control the survivors well, like Black Lilith, Mr. Blackworm, or Ms. Constancia, went instead.
1001406416.korean: 리리스 언니나 블랙웜 씨, 콘스탄챠 씨 같이 생존자들을 잘 통제하실 수 있는 분들이 가시는 편이 좋을 것 같아요.

1001406426.english: I immediately picked up the pager and asked T-14 Miho.
1001406426.korean: - 나는 즉시 호출기를 들어올리며 미호에게 물었다.

1001406429.english: The situation was very bad. Retreating to avoid the Iron Bug's attack wouldn't be that difficult, but...
1001406429.korean: - 상황이 매우 좋지 않았다. 철충의 공격을 피해 후퇴하는 것은 그리 어려운 일이 아니겠지만...

1001406444.english: And, Glacias landed elegantly with Oberonia Rhea on his back.
1001406444.korean: - 그리고, 글라시아스가 등 뒤에 레아를 태운 채로 우아하게 착지했다.

1001406450.english: - Glacias, Oberonia Rhea, and even Peregrinus...

1001406454.english: I commanded the troops via communication and began to exterminate the Iron Bug.
1001406454.korean: - 나는 통신으로 대원들을 지휘하며, 철충들을 섬멸하기 시작했다.

1001406456.english: - All the Iron Bug that escaped the tunnel were exterminated, but…

1001406457.english: - The Iron Bug destroyed the tunnel as if to forbid our entry.
1001406457.korean: - 철충들은 우리가 진입하는 것을 허락할 수 없다는 듯, 터널을 파괴했기 때문이다.

1001406460.english: - I felt a chill run down my spine as I received C-77 HongRyeon's report.
1001406460.korean: - 나는 홍련의 보고를 받으며 등골이 서늘해지는 것을 느꼈다.

1001406461.english: - The Iron Bug' movements were intelligent and cunning, as if someone were commanding them.
1001406461.korean: - 철충의 움직임은 지능적이고 교활했다. 누군가 녀석들을 지휘하기라도 하는 것처럼.

1001406464.english: The only time Iron Bug show such tactical movements
1001406464.korean: 철충이 이렇게까지 전술적인 움직임을 펼치는 경우는 오직 한 가지 뿐이었지요.

1001406477.english: - Only commanders like Leona of Blood and Iron, Mari, or Dragon-level leaders could manage that…
1001406477.korean: - 레오나나 마리, 용 정도의 지휘관들이라면 가능한 일이겠지만...

1001406488.english: The moment we engage in an all-out war with the forces of the Iron Bug, it is clear that we will be overwhelmed by numbers.
1001406488.korean: 철충의 세력과 전면전을 벌이게 되는 순간 숫자에서 압도당할 것이 분명해요.

1001406492.english: - Benevolent Leanne and her group probably lit it to signal their location.
1001406492.korean: - 아마 리앤 일행이 위치를 알리기 위해 피운 것이겠지.

1001406504.english: I signaled to Alexandra of Resonance, who was reviewing the strategy in the corner, and...
1001406504.korean: - 나는 구석에서 전략을 다시 점검하던 알렉산드라에게 신호를 보냈고...

1001406505.english: Alexandra of Resonance displayed a map on the screen and began the briefing.
1001406505.korean: - 알렉산드라는 화면에 지도를 띄우고 브리핑을 시작했다.

1001406508.english: Please look at this map. This is the current situation in London as identified by Mr. P-49 Sleipnir through high-altitude reconnaissance.
1001406508.korean: 이 지도를 봐 주세요. 슬레이프니르 씨가 고고도 정찰을 통해 파악한 런던의 현황이에요.

1001406515.english: You are right. Assuming you encounter the fewest Iron Bugs, it is the shortest route to reach the survivor group.
1001406515.korean: 생각하신 게 맞아요. 철충과 가장 적게 만난다는 가정 하에, 최단 경로로 생존자 집단에게 도착하는 경로죠.

1001406516.english: As you can see, the survivor group is completely surrounded by Iron Bug (Iron Bugs).
1001406516.korean: 보시다시피, 생존자 집단은 철충에게 완전히 포위당한 상황이죠.

1001406517.english: The Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) aren't showing any active movements right now, but once the full-scale offensive begins, we don't know how long they will be able to hold out...
1001406517.korean: 지금은 철충이 적극적인 움직임을 보이지 않고 있지만, 본격적인 공세가 시작되면 저들이 얼마나 버틸지 알 수 없으니...

1001406520.english: The remaining members of Team B move north and deal with the Iron Bug targeting Team A's rear.
1001406520.korean: 나머지 B팀의 대원들은 북쪽으로 이동하며, A팀의 뒤를 노리는 철충을 처리합니다.

1001406523.english: Yes. When the Orca first surfaces, it is highly likely to be hit by concentrated fire from nearby Iron Bugs.
1001406523.korean: 네. 오르카 호가 처음 수면 위로 부상했을 때, 근처 철충들의 집중 포화를 맞을 가능성이 높아요.

1001406524.english: So, the moment the Orca rises to the surface, Serapias Alice must unleash an indiscriminate bombardment around it and wipe out all the Iron Bug.
1001406524.korean: 그러니, 오르카 호가 수면 위로 떠오르는 순간, 앨리스 씨가 주변에 무차별 폭격을 날려 철충들을 싹 쓸어버려야만 해요.

1001406525.english: After that, you must immediately bomb Westminster Bridge to cut off the Iron Bug's reinforcements.
1001406525.korean: 그 뒤, 즉시 웨스트민스터 교를 폭격해서 철충의 지원 병력을 끊어내야 하고요.

1001406526.english: It is Ms. Black Lilith's job to protect Ms. Serapias Alice in the meantime.
1001406526.korean: 그 동안 앨리스 씨를 보호하는 것이 리리스 씨의 일입니다.

1001406540.english: I took the optical camouflage device from Black Lilith, took a deep breath, and composed myself.
1001406540.korean: - 나는 리리스에게 광학미채 장치를 받아들고, 심호흡을 하며 마음을 가다듬었다.

1001406542.english: - It was a signal that combat with the Iron Bug had begun.
1001406542.korean: - 철충과 교전을 시작했다는 것을 의미하는 신호였다.

1001406543.english: Yes, Master. And, Black Lilith... don't worry so much.
1001406543.korean: 네, 주인님. 그리고, 리리스... 너무 그렇게 걱정하지 마렴.

1001406567.english: But we're… right in the middle of the horde of Iron Bug?

1001406595.english: I'll contact P-49 Sleipnir and have the high-altitude photos of Portsmouth prepared immediately.
1001406595.korean: 슬레이프니르  씨에게 연락해서, 바로 포츠머스의 고고도 사진을 준비할게요.

1001406601.english: Then how about you host that Christmas party, Maria of Redemption?
1001406601.korean: 그러면 그 크리스마스 파티의 주최를 마리아가 하는 건 어때?

1001406607.english: Ah, Wraithy… it's nothing, just ran out of gift wrapping paper.
1001406607.korean: 아, 레이시... 별 건 아니고, 선물 포장지가 모자라서.

1001406611.english: Frigg, Wraithy. Even the City Guard. Just in time.
1001406611.korean: 프리가, 레이시. 시티가드까지. 마침 잘 왔어.

1001406615.english: CS Perrault, what's the Companion schedule for this week?
1001406615.korean: 페로, 이번 주 컴패니언 스케줄이 어떻게 되지?

1001406624.english: Mongoose team! After eliminating the Iron Bug outside the tunnel, move in immediately.
1001406624.korean: 몽구스 팀! 현재 터널 밖의 철충들을 섬멸하는 즉시 터널로 돌입한다.

1001406625.english: What do you think, Cardinal Armand?

1001406637.english: And in this process, Serapias Alice and Black Lilith have tasks to handle.
1001406637.korean: 그리고 이 과정에서 앨리스와 리리스가 해줘야 할 일이 있어.

1001406640.english: Let's go, Prototype Labiata! I'll leave the vanguard to you.

1001406653.english: Baekto changed clothes too. Did you see? Who do you like more? Magical MoMo? Or Baekto? Hehe, just kidding. You’re sure the Commander would like them all.
1001406653.korean: 백토도 같이 옷을 갈아입었는데 보셨나요?&n누가 더 마음에 드시나요?&n모모? 아니면 백토?&n헤헤, 농담이에요. 사령관님이시라면 전부&n좋아하실게 분명하잖아요.

1001406655.english: Magical MoMo likes this outfit. It feels fresh because it is different from her usual clothes, and the pattern and accessories are pretty. But above all... it is because the Commander likes it.
1001406655.korean: 모모는 이 옷이 좋아요.&n기존의 옷들과 달라서 신선하고,&n무늬나 장신구도 예뻐요.&n하지만 무엇보다도...&n사령관님이 좋아해 주시니까요.

1001406656.english: They say this outfit was made to commemorate the Year of the Rabbit back then. Wearing this, it feels like Magical MoMo can understand the rabbit's feelings a little bit, too? Please don't let Magical MoMo be lonely.
1001406656.korean: 당시 토끼의 해를 기념하기 위해서&n만든 옷이라고 해요.&n이 옷을 입으니 모모도 살짝 토끼의 기분을&n이해할 수 있는 그런 느낌?&n모모를 외롭게 하지 말아 주세요.

1001406661.english: Magical MoMo told me the rules for wearing this outfit. There are a few strange things about it, but... since Magical MoMo wouldn't trick me, I am following them exactly.
1001406661.korean: 모모가 이 옷을 입었을 때의&n규칙을 알려줬어요. 이상한 것이&n몇 가지 있지만… 모모가 저를 속일 리 없으니&n그대로 따르고 있어요.

1001406662.english: For some reason, I feel overflowing with energy when I wear this outfit. Just like when the full moon rises. I guess Magical MoMo wasn't wrong to tell me to wear this.
1001406662.korean: 이 옷을 입으면 왠지 모르게 힘이 넘쳐나요.&n마치 만월이 떴을 때처럼.&n모모가 괜히 이 옷을 입으라고 한 게&n아닌가 봐요.

1001406670.english: As expected, the clothes in the Taylor line are super cool. It's not that Audrey Dreamweaver's clothes are bad, but... I'd say they're a little overwhelming...
1001406670.korean: 역시 테일러 라인의 옷들이 초 쿨하다니까.&n오드리 옷이 나쁜 건 아니지만…&n살짝 부담된다고 할까…

1001406677.english: Hehe. I secretly wrote a few words in the Commander's room…&nDid you see it? You haven't seen it yet?&nStayed up working again, didn't you!?&nI wrote it so you could see it when you turn off the light and lie down in bed!&nI'll love you forever. P-18 Sylphid.
1001406677.korean: 헤헤. 사령관 방에 몰래 몇 마디 썼는데…&n봤어? 아직 못 봤다고?&n또 잠 안 자고 일 했지!?&n불 끄고 침대에 누우면 볼 수 있게 써뒀는데!&n영원히 당신을 사랑해. 실피드가. 라고!

1001406697.english: What I want is war. A war to overwhelmingly trample and ravage the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) that drove my friends to their deaths. That is why I call myself a warmonger. And that will not change until we win the war against the Iron Bug.
1001406697.korean: 내가 원하는 건 전쟁이야.&n내 친구들을 죽음으로 몰아넣은 철충을&n압도적으로 짓밟고 유린하는 전쟁.&n그게 내가 전쟁광을 자칭하는 이유야.&n그리고 그건 철충과의 전쟁에서&n이길 때까지 변하지 않을 거야.

1001406700.english: What I want is war. A war to overwhelmingly trample and ravage the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) that drove my friends to their deaths. That is why I call myself a warmonger. And that will not change until we win the war against the Iron Bug.
1001406700.korean: 내가 원하는 건 전쟁이야.&n내 친구들을 죽음으로 몰아넣은 철충을&n압도적으로 짓밟고 유린하는 전쟁.&n그게 내가 전쟁광을 자칭하는 이유야.&n그리고 그건 철충과의 전쟁에서&n이길 때까지 변하지 않을 거야.

1001406724.english: P/A-00 Griffon and LRL are running late. Would you like to read the rulebook while you wait? Or maybe just the two of us could play a simple game? Either way, it would be fun to be with you, Master.
1001406724.korean: 그리폰이랑 LRL이 늦네요.&n기다리시는 동안 룰북을 읽어보시겠어요?&n아니면 저랑 둘이서 간단하게 게임이라도?&n어느 쪽이든 주인님과 함께이니 즐겁겠네요.

1001406739.english: I've been getting closely marked by the City Guards lately, so Sister Black Lilith sent me to the shrine to keep quiet for the time being. The shrine is boring!
1001406739.korean: 요즘 시티 가드한테 집중 마크 당하니까&n리리스 언니가 당분간은 조용히 있으라고&n신사로 보냈어.&n신사는 지루해!

1001406740.english: Black Lilith initially intended to send me to Kohei. But I guess she didn't like some of Kohei's doctrines. I'm fine with it, though...
1001406740.korean: 리리스 언니가 처음에는 코헤이로&n보내려고 했어. 그런데 코헤이의 어떤 교리가&n마음에 안 들었나봐.&n나는 괜찮은데…

1001406741.english: When I went to the shrine, there was a guy with many tails, a suspicious guy, Hachiko of Castling, and some little guy. Then wouldn't it be okay if just one of me wasn't there?
1001406741.korean: 신사에 가니까, 꼬리 많은 애랑, 수상한 애랑,&n하치코랑, 뭔가 조그마한 애가 있었어.&n그러면 나 하나 정도는 없어도 되지 않을까?

1001406744.english: I was secretly grilling meat with Hirume, but I got caught by Shirayuri and got scolded. She said the smell would linger. Hachiko of Castling cooked for us with the leftover meat, but surprisingly, Varg didn't really like eating meat.
1001406744.korean: 히루메랑 같이 몰래 고기 구워 먹다가 &n시라유리한테 걸려서 혼났어. 냄새 밴다고.&n하치코가 남은 고기로 요리 해줬는데,&n바르그는 의외로 고기 잘 못 먹더라.

1001406745.english: Sister Black Lilith told me to stay still... but if you keep it like this, I can't stay still, Master~
1001406745.korean: 리리스 언니가 얌전히 있으라고 했는데…&n이러면 얌전히 못 있게 되는데, 주인님~

1001406747.english: Master, welcome! Huh? Isn't it boring these days?&nHmm… not really? Other kids are good too,&nFood is tasty, and City Guard isn't annoying.&nAbove all… Master comes to see us often!&nAh! Hachiko of Castling is calling. Let's go, Master!
1001406747.korean: 주인님, 어서와! 응? 요즘은 지루하지 않냐고?&n음… 그다지? 다른 애들도 좋은 애들이고,&n밥도 맛있고, 시티 가드가 귀찮게 안 하고.&n무엇보다도… 주인님이 자주 만나러 오잖아!&n아! 하치코가 부른다. 가자, 주인님!

1001406757.english: Taylor is always calculating cost-effectiveness, while Audrey Dreamweaver insists that beauty is everything... For the best work, isn't a designer's motivation—that is, interest—the most important thing?
1001406757.korean: 테일러 언니는 맨날 경제성을 따지고,&n오드리는 무조건 예쁜 게 최고라고 하고…&n최고의 작품을 위해서는 디자이너의&n모티베이션, 즉 흥미가 제일 중요한 거 아냐?

1001406761.english: Taylor and Audrey Dreamweaver both designed costumes for movies and plays, but they couldn't keep up with me in this field. You know how they say a genius can't beat someone who works hard, and someone who works hard can't beat someone who enjoys what they do? … … though the opposite is true too.
1001406761.korean: 테일러 언니도, 오드리도 영화나 연극 의상을&n디자인했지만 이쪽 분야는 나를 따라오지&n못 했어. 천재는 노력하는 자를 이길 수 없고,&n노력하는 자는 즐기는 자를 이길 수 없다고&n하잖아? ……반대도 마찬가지지만.

1001406770.english: I am AL AL Phantom, a special operative of Orca, responsible for covert missions such as assassination, facility destruction, and infiltration of enemy lines.&nOnce again, I look forward to your guidance.
1001406770.korean: 암살과 시설 파괴, 적진 잠입 등의 은밀 임무를&n전담하는 오르카의 특급 요원, AL 팬텀입니다.&n다시 한 번 잘 부탁드립니다.

1001406774.english: I am the special operative AL Phantom who can carry out any difficult mission.&nSo please reconsider sending Submarine for sandwich deliveries!&nSubmarine still can't handle it!
1001406774.korean: 그 어떤 어려운 임무도 해내는 것이 바로 저,&n특급 요원 팬텀입니다. 그러니, 서브마린에&n샌드위치 심부름을 보내시는 건 재고해주세요!&n아직 서브마린은 힘들단 말이에요!

1001406780.english: AL Phantom Black! And Lace White! Together, AL Cute! They are righteous magical girls who exterminate evil.
1001406780.korean: 팬텀 블랙! 그리고 레이스 화이트!&n둘이서 AL 큐트!&n악을 섬멸하는 정의로운 마법소녀들이죠.

1001406797.english: Vice-Captain AG-2C Sirene seems too busy, so I have decided to help my subordinates by working as a barista at Café Horizon. I look forward to working with you, my Lord.
1001406797.korean: 세이렌 부함장이 너무 바빠 보여서,&n소관이 부하들을 도와 카페 호라이즌의&n바리스타를 하기로 했소.&n잘 부탁드리오, 주군.

1001406798.english: I have perfectly mastered the art of brewing coffee. I have been properly trained by Captain Indomitable Marie and the other members, so I will never make a mistake.
1001406798.korean: 커피를 내리는 법은 완벽히 숙지하고 있소.&n마리 대장과 다른 대원들에게 제대로&n훈련 받았으니, 결코 실수는 없을 것이오.

1001406811.english: T-14 Miho recommended a cafe, T-60 Bulgasari a clothing store, and P-24 Pinto a movie theater. Where do you like? Me? Anywhere as long as I'm with the Commander!
1001406811.korean: 미호는 카페, 불가사리는 옷가게,&n핀토는 영화관을 추천해줬어.&n어디가 좋아?&n나? 사령관과 함께라면 어디든지!

1001406817.english: Sonia of Devastation was looking for a good spot to suck up honey before... I wonder if there is some special place where the honey tastes even better? Then, Aqua, I'm going to look for a good spot to suck up honey too!
1001406817.korean: 전에 소니아 언니가 꿀 빨기 좋은 장소를&n찾던데... 꿀이 더 맛있어지는 특별한 곳이&n있기라도 한 걸까?&n그럼, 아쿠아도 꿀 빨기 좋은 곳을 찾아볼래!

1001406875.english: Are you talking about C-77 HongRyeon? I saw her committing acts of destruction while looking just like me. Absolutely not. I cannot tolerate this. I will catch her with my own hands without fail.
1001406875.korean: 홍련 말입니까? 저와 비슷한 외모를 한 채로&n파괴 행위를 일삼는 것을 보았습니다.&n절대로. 용납할 수 없습니다.&n기필코 제 손으로 잡겠습니다.

1001406902.english: I can't lose to Sekhmet of Death and Cerestia of Life. I'm going to show them clearly that I'm the real older sister... Huh? You're saying those two aren't older sisters... but more like the mom?
1001406902.korean: 세크메트랑 세레스티아한테 질 수는 없지.&n내가 진짜 누나라는 걸 똑똑히 보여주도록...&n어? 그 둘은 누나가 아니라...&n엄마 포지션이라고?

1001406942.english: I tried on a suit following T-13 Alvis's lead... and somehow ended up receiving bodyguard training from the Companions.
1001406942.korean: 알비스를 따라 정장을 입어봤는데...&n어쩌다보니 컴패니언 분들께&n보디가드 연수를 받게 되었어요.

1001406959.english: If T-13 Alvis is the Choco Guard and Vera is the Bodyguard... since I guard the warehouse... am I the Warehouse Guard?
1001406959.korean: 알비스 언니가 초코가드고, 베라 언니가&n보디가드라면… 저는 창고를 지키니까…&n창고가드인 걸까요?

1001406961.english: Someday, I will become a cool person like Captain Leona of Blood and Iron. My goal is to support you by your side and protect the older sisters.
1001406961.korean: 저도 언젠간 레오나 대장님처럼 멋진 사람이&n될 거예요. 대장님을 옆에서 보좌하며,&n언니들을 지키는 게 제 목표에요.

1001406962.english: T-13 Alvis is really strange. She's so reliable on the battlefield, but strangely enough, as soon as she comes back to base... Ugh. I don't know what the problem is.
1001406962.korean: 알비스 언니는 참 이상해요. 전장에서는 참&n믿음직한데, 이상하게 기지에만 돌아오면…&n에휴. 뭐가 문제인지 모르겠어요.

1001406977.english: My sisters... especially Captain Leona of Blood and Iron, cheered for me. Thanks to their support, I was able to take that final step.
1001406977.korean: 자매들이… 특히나 레오나 대장님께서&n저를 응원해주셨습니다.&n자매들의 응원이 있었기에 마지막 한 걸음을&n내딛을 수 있었습니다.

1001407046.english: Isn't it because my subordinates are competent that I am at ease? Panther goes without saying, Io is diligent, Carly is ambitious, and as for A-14B Spriggan… … … please give me a moment to think.
1001407046.korean: 부하가 유능하니 제가 편한 거 아니겠습니까.&n팬서는 말할 것도 없고, 이오는 성실하고,&n칼리는 향상심이 강하고, 스프리건은…&n……잠깐 생각할 시간을 주십쇼.

1001407074.english: You're asking if I'm not working? It's fine, it's fine. I have Olivia and Audrey Dreamweaver, after all. It's just one of me... What? You saw Olivia in the audiovisual room?
1001407074.korean: 일 안 하냐고? 괜찮아, 괜찮아.&n올리비아랑 오드리도 있잖아.&n나 하나 정도야… &n뭐? 시청각실에서 올리비아를 봤다고?

1001407083.english: You ask if I'm not working? I am. Preparing for the contest. And Taylor and Audrey Dreamweaver are here, too. Just one of me is nothing... What? Taylor said the exact same thing?
1001407083.korean: 일 안 하냐고? 하고 있잖아. 콘테스트 준비.&n그리고 테일러 언니랑 오드리도 있고 말이야.&n나 하나 정도야…&n뭐? 테일러 언니도 똑같은 말을 했다고?

1001407142.english: Tomo gave me shaved ice, Shirayuri gave me energy jelly, and T-14 Miho gave me chocolate ice cream. They said I did a good job. Hehe, this is the reward of being a lifeguard.
1001407142.korean: 토모가 빙수, 시라유리가 에너지 젤리,&n미호가 초코 아이스크림 주고 갔어.&n수고한다고.&n헤헤, 이게 라이프가드의 보람이지.

1001407143.english: Haven't you seen Sonia of Devastation? If you meet her, I won't expect you to act as a lifeguard, but at least tell her not to go swimming after drinking.
1001407143.korean: 소니아 못 봤어?&n걔 만나면 안전요원 역할까지는&n안 바랄테니까 적어도 술 마시고&n물놀이는 하지 말라고 해 줘.

1001407144.english: A T-40 Hyena set off a giant firework on the beach, Harpe drifted away past a buoy while riding a tube, and AG-1 Nereid and Galatea... Hehehe, I've just been complaining too much.
1001407144.korean: 하이에나가 해변에서 거대 폭죽을 터트리고,&n하르페가 튜브 타다가 부표 너머로&n떠내려가고, 네레이드랑 갈라테아가…&n에헤헤, 너무 푸념만 했네.

1001407153.english: Whenever I run into Saraqael, he gives me food, saying he’s proud of me for keeping the law... I don’t really know the law, but he seems like a good person.
1001407153.korean: 사라카엘님이랑 마주칠 때마다&n율법을 지키는 모습이 기특하다면서&n먹을 걸 주시는데… 율법은 잘 모르겠지만&n좋은 분이신 것 같아요.

1001407159.english: Yap! Superhero P-24 Pinto!&nNot a special forces operative, you say?&nEh, it's basically the same thing.
1001407159.korean: 얍! 슈퍼 히어로 핀토야!&n특수 작전대 아니냐고?&n에이. 하는 일은 똑같잖아.

1001407161.english: A hero does need a sidekick, after all…&nBut Mom's Mom, T-60 Bulgasari is too slow, T-14 Miho asks for too much, and Draco is…&nYeah. Draco's nice. He's nice…
1001407161.korean: 히어로에게는 역시나 사이드킥이 필요한데…&n엄마는 엄마고, 불가사리는 느리고, 미호는 &n바라는 게 너무 많고, 드라코는…&n응. 드라코는 착하지... 착해.

1001407174.english: It's going to be hard to say a word to Sonia of Devastation. Swimming while having a drink... I wonder if it'll be okay since you're here?
1001407174.korean: 소니아한테 한소리 하기 힘들겠네.&n수영장에서 술 한 잔 기울이면서&n수영을 하다니...&n당신이 있으니 괜찮으려나?

1001407180.english: You mean this swimsuit? It's Taylor's work. She said she got the inspiration while studying vocabulary with X-05 Emily after seeing a peel-and-stick sticker bookmark.
1001407180.korean: 이 수영복 말인가? 테일러의 작품이다.&n에밀리와 낱말 공부를 하다가&n붙였다 뗐다 하는 스티커형 책갈피를 보고&n영감을 떠올렸다고 하더군.

1001407183.english: The AT-100 Beast Hunter saw this swimsuit and freaked out, saying it was bad for X-05 Emily's education. I guess I'll have to tell her to hide for a while if she doesn't want to hear Taylor nag her.
1001407183.korean: 비스트헌터가 이 수영복을 보더니&n에밀리 교육에 나쁘다며 기겁을 하더군.&n아무래도 테일러에게 잔소리 듣기 싫으면&n당분간은 숨어다니라고 전해줘야겠어.

1001407193.english: You ask what the milk Sekhmet of Death sells tastes like? That’s… a secret! You should focus on her when you’re with her, Commander!
1001407193.korean: 세크메트가 파는 우유는 무슨 맛이냐고?&n그건… 비밀이야! 누나랑 같이 있을 때는&n누나한테 집중해야지, 사령관!

1001407200.english: Even though it's a summer combat uniform, it's not only worn in summer. Sometimes it's used on purpose during cold-weather training… or when T-2 Brownie causes trouble.
1001407200.korean: 하계 전투복이지만&n여름에만 입는 것은 아닙니다.&n혹한기 훈련 때 일부러 입기도 하고......&n브라우니가 사고를 쳐서... 입기도 합니다.

1001407202.english: Last time, I made a slip of the tongue in front of Colonel B-11 Night Angel. The Colonel spoke harshly, but thankfully forgave me.
1001407202.korean: 지난 번에 나이트 앤젤 대령님에게&n말 실수를 했던 적이 있어요.&n대령님께서 심술궂게 말씀하셨지만&n다행히 용서해주셨어요.

1001407208.english: Today, I am your math teacher, T-3 Leprechaun. What would you like me to teach you first? Huh? The one on the blackboard? Uh... I mean... could I, could I call the Doctor?
1001407208.korean: 오늘은 수학 선생님 레프리콘이에요.&n무엇부터 알려드릴까요?&n네? 칠판에 있는 거요? 어… 그러니까...&n다, 닥터 불러와도 될까요?

1001407209.english: I tried following Alexandra of Resonance's example... but it doesn't really suit me. I think reasoning with words works better for me than physical punishment.
1001407209.korean: 알렉산드라 님을 따라해봤는데…&n저하고는 좀 안 맞는 거 같아요.&n저에게는 체벌 보다는 말로 타이르는 쪽이&n더 맞는 거 같아요.

1001407210.english: There are probably some students who cause a lot of trouble. But no troublemaker... would be as bad as T-2 Brownie...
1001407210.korean: 학생 중에는 사고를 많이 치는&n학생도 있겠죠.&n하지만 어떤 사고뭉치도...&n브라우니만큼 심하지는 않겠죠…

1001407211.english: Captain Indomitable Marie asked me what I wanted to do when the war ended. I couldn't answer back then... but I think I can say it now.
1001407211.korean: 전에 마리 대장님께서 전쟁이 끝나면&n무엇이 하고 싶냐고 물으셨어요.&n그때는 대답을 못 했지만...&n지금은 말할 수 있을 것 같아요.

1001407219.english: Mr. Goltarion XIII was amazing. Even though he was originally a villain, he set the standard for a knight pursuing justice. Though he did occasionally shout out Ms. Pokkuru's name.
1001407219.korean: 골타리온 씨 굉장했어요.&n원래는 빌런이었으면서 정의를 추구하는&n기사의 본보기를 보여줬어요.&n가끔 뽀끄루 씨의 이름을 부르짖기는&n했지만요.

1001407236.english: Do you see the wolf blood on this axe? This is the proof of a true hunter… Huh? You’re looking for Sowan? Eek…
1001407236.korean: 이 도끼에 묻은 늑대들의 피가 보이느냐?&n이것이야말로 진정한 사냥꾼의 증거…&n응? 소, 소완이 찾고 있다고? 히익…

1001407253.english: I'm not Neodim, I'm AL Phantom Thief N. I'm a fearsome thief who can steal anything. … But please don't be too scared of me.
1001407253.korean: 난 네오딤이 아니라 괴도 N이야.&n못 훔치는 게 없는 무시무시한 도둑이지.&n…그래도 너무 무서워하진 말아줘.

1001407254.english: T-13 Alvis and LRL want to rob the treasure vault together, but does the Commander know where the treasure vault is?
1001407254.korean: 알비스랑 LRL이 같이 보물고를 털자는데,&n사령관은 보물고가 어디인지 알아?

1001407255.english: AL Phantom Thief N is a righteous outlaw, so he only steals from bad people… and bunny girls. … The second one is a setting that NiBA just put in on his own.
1001407255.korean: 괴도 N은 의적이라서, 나쁜 사람들이랑…&n바니걸한테서만 물건을 훔쳐.&n…두번째는 니바가 멋대로 넣은 설정이야.

1001407256.english: I originally planned to wear a detective outfit... but my teacher said that bad girls are the trend these days, so I decided to change direction from a detective to a AL Phantom thief.
1001407256.korean: 원래는 탐정 복장을 입으려고 했는데…&n선생님이 요즘은 나쁜 여자가 대세라고 해서&n탐정에서 괴도로 방향을 바꾸기로 했어.

1001407258.english: I'll give Commander the AL Phantom Thief N's notice of crime.&nBecause you've stolen my heart...&nI'm going to steal yours too.
1001407258.korean: 괴도 N의 범죄 예고장을... 사령관한테 줄게.&n사령관이 내 마음을 훔쳤으니까...&n나도 사령관의 마음을 훔치러 갈 거거든.

1001407266.english: Iron Annie's bike? I didn't ride it secretly. I got permission from Iron Annie. … … I got her to drink a ton and got her permission…
1001407266.korean: 애니 바이크?&n몰래 탄 거 아인데?&n애니한테 허락 받았는데?&n……잔뜩 술 먹이고 허락 받았다…

1001407304.english: T-13 Alvis says let's leave the gun behind and eat a chocolate bar together? Hehe, I guess I should prepare some cannoli to eat together.
1001407304.korean: 알비스가 총은 놔두고 &n같이 초코바를 먹자고 하네요? &n후훗, 같이 먹을 카놀리를 준비해야겠어요

1001407355.english: Praise and applaud more. Because I, Lady Draculina, am that amazing... ... Th-You can stop now! Stop! Stop it!
1001407355.korean: 좀 더 칭찬하고 박수치고 하라고.&n이 드라큐리나 님은 그만큼 대단하니까...&n…이, 이제 그만 해도 돼! 그만! 그만 하라고!

1001407356.english: Since you have suffered so much for me all this time… I will grant you the special privilege of serving Lady Draculina for the rest of your life. Right beside me.
1001407356.korean: 여태까지 날 위해 고생해 줬으니까…&n너한테는 특별히 평생 이 드라큐리나 님을&n모실 수 있는 특권을 줄게.&n바로 내 옆자리에서 말이야.

1001407369.english: "What is this triangular thing I'm wearing on my head...? I... I don't really know either, but Magical MoMo said that if I'm a ghost, I obviously have to wear it, so...
1001407369.korean: 머리에 쓰고 있는 세모난 이게 뭐냐고…?&n나… 나도 잘 모르는데, 모모가 &n유령이면 당연히 써야 되는 거라고 그래서…

1001407371.english: I was waiting to surprise LRL and T-13 Alvis... but instead of surprising them, I just ended up making them worry by asking if it hurt...
1001407371.korean: LRL이랑 알비스를 놀라게 해주려고 &n기다리고 있었는데… 놀라게 하기는커녕&n아프지 않냐고 걱정만 시키고 말았어…

1001407391.english: Hathor of the Heavenly Cow is strawberry milk, Dark Elven is chocolate milk, Cerestia of Life is banana milk... Commander... are you perhaps thinking about what my milk tastes like right now...?
1001407391.korean: 하토르 씨는 딸기우유, 다크엘븐은 초코우유,&n세레스티아 씨는 바나나우유... &n사령관님... 혹시 지금 제 우유는 무슨 맛이&n날지 생각하고 계신가요…?

1001407394.english: When this happens, the commander really acts like a child.&nIt's considered. Hehe, if it were Ms. Frigga or Ms. Cerestia of Life...&nI understand now...
1001407394.korean: 이럴 때면 사령관님이 정말 어린아이처럼 &n여겨져요. 헤헤, 프리가씨나 세레스티아씨가&n이해되네요…

1001407398.english: I received a lot of help from Amy Razor. From counseling to planning and execution. And… in the past as well.
1001407398.korean: 에이미에게 큰 도움을 받았어요.&n상담부터 계획, 실행까지.&n그리고… 과거에도.

1001407424.english: GS-10 Sand Girl-nim is spontaneous.&nIt feels like I'm carrying out a mission.&nHowever, the spontaneous method is&nIt's often more effective.
1001407424.korean: 샌드걸 님은 즉흥적으로&n임무를 수행하는 느낌이 강합니다.&n하지만 즉흥적인 방법이&n더 유효할 때도 많더군요.

1001407434.english: The security system of Orca designed by Scathy is reliable, but... it [c][FC2424]highlights the things I hacked in red[-][/c]... so sometimes it is a bit troublesome.
1001407434.korean: 스카디 님이 설계하신&n오르카의 보안 시스템은 믿음직스럽지만...&n제가 해킹한 것들을 [c][FC2424]붉은 색으로 강조[-][/c]해서…&n조금 곤란할 때도 있어요.

1001407445.english: Master, the field medical manual...&nCould you please review it?&nAs you know... in the olden days,&nTreat bioroids as consumables only.&nBecause I hardly saw any of that.
1001407445.korean: 주인님, 야전 치료 매뉴얼을&n검토해 주시겠어요?&n아시다시피… 옛 시대에는&n바이오로이드를 소모품으로만&n봐서 그런 게 거의 없었거든요.

1001407447.english: With the Watcher MQ-20s of Nature,&nIt's a friendly rivalry.&nAlthough we compete, we do it for the patients.&nWe have the same priorities.
1001407447.korean: 와쳐 오브 네이쳐 분들과는&n선의의 라이벌 관계예요.&n경쟁을 하기는 하지만 환자분들을&n우선시하는 마음은 같죠.

1001407448.english: Sometimes, Mr. Circe, Ms. Iron Annie, Ms. Connector Yumi,&nMr. Werewolf and a group of others are in the infirmary.&nThere's a time when it comes. ...because of a hangover.
1001407448.korean: 가끔 키르케 씨, 애니 씨, 유미 씨,&n워울프 씨가 단체로 의무실에&n올 때가 있어요. ……숙취 때문에요.

1001407470.english: When this happens, E-16 Talon Feather told me to say this.&nAll the characters appearing here are over 20 years old...&nBig Brother... so please, feel free to...
1001407470.korean: 이럴 때 탈론페더가 이 말을 하라고 하더군.&n여기 등장하는 모든 인물은 20세 이상이다…&n오빠… 그러니까 부디 마음껏…

1001407481.english: Talon has been running around secretly lately, and before I knew it, he had prepared these clothes. Captain Khan the Swift wasn't keen on it, but after Talon said a few words, he obediently put them on.
1001407481.korean: 탈론이 최근에 몰래 무슨 짓을 하고 다니더니&n어느새 이런 옷을 준비했더라고.&n칸 대장은 내켜 하지 않았지만&n탈론이 몇 마디 하니까 순순히 입더라니까.

1001407489.english: Captain Khan the Swift said we did a great job on the last mission.&nThey're saying to meet at Cafe Horizon.&nBut... you said you couldn't go.&nI have a date with the commander right now, so...
1001407489.korean: 칸 대장이 지난 작전 수고 많았다고&n카페 호라이즌으로 모이라고 하네.&n하지만… 못 간다고 했지.&n지금은 사령관이랑 데이트 해야하니까.

1001407492.english: Pirate crew... I want to work with Captain Khan the Swift, you know?&nOkay, should we try making a Horde pirate crew next time?
1001407492.korean: 해적단... 칸 대장이랑 같이 하고 싶은걸?&n좋아, 다음에는 호드 해적단을 만들어 볼까?

1001407502.english: LRL, T-13 Alvis. The cake and the present aren't running away, so calm down. Ah, Commander. Ahaha, it's fine. I'm used to it. And I like times like this, too.
1001407502.korean: LRL, 알비스. 케이크도 선물도&n안 도망가니까, 진정해.&n아, 사령관. 아하하, 괜찮아. 익숙하니까.&n그리고 이런 시간도 좋아 하니까.

1001407520.english: The Horde went to karaoke as a group a while ago, you know? Surprisingly, Keshik sang really well. And Captain Khan the Swift kept holding back, but he sang at the very end and was amazing. … … even though it was a military song.
1001407520.korean: 얼마 전에 호드에서 단체로 노래방갔거든?&n의외로 케시크가 노래 잘 부르더라?&n그리고 칸 대장도 계속 빼다가&n마지막에 불렀는데 엄청 잘 불렀어.&n……군가이긴 하지만.

1001407528.english: I suppose I could find out who I really was if I asked Mr. Cardinal Armand. But I want to figure it out on my own. Now that I’ve finally found what I want to do, I want to enjoy it. Hehehe.
1001407528.korean: 원래의 제가 누구였는지 아르망 씨에게&n물어보면 알 수 있겠죠.&n하지만 스스로 알아보고 싶어요.&n저 스스로 하고 싶은 일을 드디어&n찾았으니 그것을 즐기고 싶어요. 에헤헤.

1001407530.english: I've been really into watching old movies lately. The works from before the apocalypse are all amazing. Personally, Bismarck's… Oh wait, this is a secret from Mr. EB-48G Hraesvelgr.
1001407530.korean: 요즘 옛날 영화를 보는 것에 푹 빠졌어요.&n멸망하기 전의 작품들은 모두 대단하네요. &n개인적으로 비스마르크의…&n아차, 이건 흐레스벨그 씨에게 비밀이에요.

1001407542.english: This outfit was made by Audrey Dreamweaver. She is a magical designer with the magic to breathe life into fabric. She said it expresses my feelings for the gentleman.
1001407542.korean: 이 옷은 오드리 씨가 만들어 준 옷이에요.&n옷감에 생명을 불어넣는 마법을 가진&n매지컬 디자이너지요.&n젠틀맨에 대한 제 마음을 표현했다네요.

1001407543.english: Magical MoMo, Pokkuru, and… um… even Goltarion, though I don’t really like him. Everyone helped make this outfit. I should probably thank them separately later.
1001407543.korean: 모모와 뽀끄루, 그리고… 으음…&n마음에는 들지 않지만, 골타리온까지.&n모두가 이 옷을 만드는 걸 도와줬어요.&n나중에 따로 감사인사를 해야겠죠.

1001407582.english: You can't win a war alone.&nIn that sense, I'm not lucky.&nLike sirens, P-3M Undines, MH-4 Thetis, and AG-1 Nereids.&nBecause I have reliable subordinates with me.
1001407582.korean: 혼자서는 전쟁에서 승리할 수 없다.&n그런 의미에서 난 운이 좋지.&n세이렌, 운디네, 테티스, 네레이드처럼&n든든한 부하들을 데리고 있으니까.

1001407583.english: Being by your side, the last human...&nThe Iron Bugs that cover this land and&nWe could fight endlessly.&nJust imagining it is already fun.
1001407583.korean: 마지막 인간인 그대 옆에 있으면...&n이 땅을 뒤덮고 있는 철충들과&n끝없는 싸움을 벌일 수 있겠지.&n상상만 해도 벌써 즐겁군.

1001407620.english: Come to think of it, Mr. Hachiko of Castling mentioned that he is preparing a new menu for the Master as well. He ordered a large quantity of mint... I wonder what kind of menu it is?
1001407620.korean: 그러고 보니 하치코 씨도 주인님을 위한&n새로운 메뉴를 준비중이라고 했어요.&n민트를 대량으로 주문했던데…&n어떤 메뉴일까요?

1001407627.english: Hachiko of Castling is learning to bake these days! I'm going to make lots of delicious bread and make everyone happy!
1001407627.korean: 하치코, 요즘 제빵을 배우고 있어요!&n맛있는 빵을 잔뜩 만들어서&n모두를 행복하게 만들어 줄 거예요!

1001407630.english: Thanks to Black Lilith and Pero's help, I'm now able to sell the mint chocolate meat pie I made! Please give it a try, Master!
1001407630.korean: 리리스 언니랑 페로가 도와줘서,&n제가 만든 민트초코 미트파이를&n판매할 수 있게 되었어요!&n주인님도 한 번 드셔보세요!

1001407631.english: The person who likes mint chocolate meat pies the most isn't actually me, but T-8W Valkyrie. This happened a while ago, but she actually packed up all the pies I made!
1001407631.korean: 민트초코 미트파이를 제일 좋아하는 사람은&n사실 제가 아니라 발키리 언니예요.&n예전에 있던 일인데, 제가 만든 파이들을&n전부 포장해갔다니까요?

1001407634.english: Hng, Master's hand... it's so warm...&nHachiko of Castling is melting like butter...
1001407634.korean: 흐앙, 주인님의 손… 너무 따뜻해서…&n하치코가 버터처럼 녹아버려요...

1001407635.english: This big meat pie is for the master,&nThis medium-sized meat pie is Hachiko of Castling's.&nAnd this little meat pie... hehehe.
1001407635.korean: 이 커다란 미트파이는 주인님 거,&n이 중간 크기 미트파이는 하치코 거,&n그리고 이 작은 미트파이는… 에헤헤.

1001407654.english: Ahoy, Commander! It's the privateer GS-130 Phoenix!&n...Wait, are you saying that even tho there's no ship, you're still a pirate?&nYou're not thinking of making a lame tackle, are you?
1001407654.korean: 아호이, 사령관! 사략해적 피닉스야!&n…잠깐, 설마 배도 없는데 왜 해적이냐는&n멋없는 태클을 걸 생각은 아니겠지?

1001407659.english: Of course, I don't have a boat. But...&nThere's only one person who can carry me.&nCommander, why don't we take the GS-130 Phoenix for a spin...&nWant to try a night sail together?
1001407659.korean: 물론 나한테 배는 없지. 하지만…&n내 위에 태워줄 수 있는 사람은 하나 있어.&n사령관, 한번 피닉스 호를 타고…&n둘이서 밤 항해라도 해 볼래?

1001407667.english: Sorry. If you don't have anything urgent, let's meet later. C-77 HongRyeon might collapse upon seeing this... Oh my... I didn't know C-77 HongRyeon would be like this...
1001407667.korean: 미안. 급한 용건 없으면 나중에 보자.&n홍련이 이 모습 보고 쓰러져서…&n아씨... 홍련이 이럴 줄은 몰랐는데…

1001407674.english: When I found out Cheona had lied,&nI was really angry, but I'm okay now.&nBecause my boyfriend said it was good. And...&nCheona, I turned off the boiler while you were showering, so I got my revenge.
1001407674.korean: 천아가 속였다는 걸 알았을 때는&n많이 빡쳤는데… 지금은 괜찮아.&n남친이 좋다고 했으니까. 그리고…&n천아 샤워할 때 보일러 꺼서 복수했으니까.

1001407686.english: The A-1 Bloody Panther comes by every day asking if their captain is here. Nashorn isn't always here... but he was here today?
1001407686.korean: 블러디 팬서가 맨날 찾아와서&n자기네 대장 여기 있냐고 물어봐.&n나스호른이 언제나 있는 건 아닌데…&n……오늘은 있었네?

1001407695.english: I asked T-9 Gremlin to upgrade my weapon... and she hugged my gun and cried. She asked why I was born so hopeless... Ha ha ha. That hopeless thing is my standard issue weapon.
1001407695.korean: 그렘린 언니에게 무기 개량을 부탁했더니…&n제 총을 끌어안고 울더군요.&n왜 이렇게 답이 없게 태어났냐고…&n하. 하. 하. 그 답 없는 게 제 제식무기입니다.

1001407703.english: Originally, Ryan was developed separately from me. However, since Ryan and I are a good match and he is especially helpful for my psychological stability, Captain Leona of Blood and Iron told us to travel together.
1001407703.korean: 원래 라이언은 저랑 별개로 개발되었어요.&n하지만 저랑 라이언이 궁합이 잘 맞고&n특히나 제 심리 안정에 도움이 돼서&n레오나 대장님이 함께 다니라고 했어요.

1001407704.english: I trained with Steel Line last time... Is it T-3 Leprechaun? It was interesting to see the weapon he used fire without a single malfunction. ... ... It was incredibly interesting.
1001407704.korean: 지난 번에 스틸라인이랑 같이 훈련을 했는데…&n레프리콘인가? 그 사람이 쓰는 무기가&n작동불량 하나 없이 발사되는 게 흥미로웠어요.&n……엄청 흥미로웠어요.

1001407707.english: I was thinking of forming a crew with P-18 Sylphid... but we decided against it because of a difference of opinion. That guy insisted that Mei is the best! No matter what anyone says, Captain Khan the Swift is the best!
1001407707.korean: 실피드랑 크루 한 번 짜보려고 했는데…&n견해 차이로 안 하기로 했어.&n그 녀석이 메이가 최고라고 우겼다고!&n누가 뭐래도 최고는 칸 대장이잖아!

1001407717.english: My goal is to one day succeed Captain Khan the Swift and become the second leader of the Horde Alliance. Though that seems a bit difficult for now.
1001407717.korean: 내 목표는 언젠가 칸 대장의 뒤를 이어서&n호드 연합의 2대 두목이 되는 거야.&n아직까진 좀 힘들 것 같지만 말이지.

1001407719.english: A woman who calls herself a delinquent should use a yo-yo as a weapon... but I went out to fight with a yo-yo and gave up because T-4 Kheshig freaked out.
1001407719.korean: 불량배를 자칭하는 여자라면&n요요를 무기로 써야 하는 법인데…&n요요를 들고 싸우러 나갔다가&n케시크가 기겁하길래 포기했어.

1001407794.english: I went to the food warehouse with T-13 Alvis yesterday. C-33 Andvari's trap? It was useless against the brain of this super-genius killer whale beauty!
1001407794.korean: 어제 알비스랑 같이 부식 창고에 갔어.&n안드바리의 함정 쯤이야.&n이 초 천재 범고래 미소녀의 두뇌 앞에선 무용지물이었지!

1001407814.english: I asked Miss Audrey Dreamweaver to design it, making sure not to hide the beautiful muscles that embrace my fragile heart as much as possible. Hehe... I knew you would like it this much, you know?
1001407814.korean: 제 연약한 마음을 감싸는 아름다운 근육을&n최대한 가리지 않는 선에서 오드리 양에게 디자인해달라 했어요.&n후후… 역시 자기가 이렇게 좋아해 할 줄 알았다니까요?

1001407815.english: Hehe, Audrey Dreamweaver's dress... doesn't it look like a kind of case? A case that suits this body... Huh? Honey... if you keep touching it like that, something might go wrong~
1001407815.korean: 후후, 오드리의 드레스… 일종의 케이스 같지 않나요?&n이 바디에 어울리는 케이스…&n읏? 자기… 자꾸 그렇게 만지면 버그 날지도 몰라요~​

1001407833.english: P-18 Sylphid looked at me and immediately complimented me, saying I was super cool! Hahaha~ I'm feeling super high right now, you know? Boss, should we go for a drive together, keeping this feeling just right?
1001407833.korean: 실피드가 날 보더니, 대뜸 초~ 쿨! 하다고 칭찬 하더라고.&n하하하~ 지금 나, 기분 초~ 하이 하거든?&n대장, 지금 이 느낌 그대로 같이 드라이빙이라도 땡길까?​

1001407858.english: The Commander always calls for me often... LLR and T-13 Alvis know we're just putting the Commander to sleep... but shall we try some deep sleep therapy until we're exhausted...?
1001407858.korean: 사령관님께선&n늘 저를 자주 부르시더군요…&nLRL과 알비스는 그저 사령관님을&n코 재우는 거라 알고 있지만…&n피곤할 때까지 잔뜩…&n숙면 테라피를 해볼까요?​

1001407860.english: T-13 Alvis said… that the Commander likes chocolate… Here… there’s some delicious chocolate right in front of you. Could you… unwrap this for me?
1001407860.korean: 알비스가 말했어요…&n사령관님은&n초콜릿을 좋아한다고…&n여기…&n맛있는 초콜릿이&n눈 앞에 있어요.&n이 '포장' 좀…&n까주실래요?​

1001407912.english: I was talking to Sergeant T-20S Gnome earlier. You ask what I was talking about? Oh, nothing. I was just saying that with a figure like yours, the Commander would definitely… like it… Hehehe…
1001407912.korean: 아까 노움 병장님이랑 이야기하고 있었어요.&n무슨 이야기냐고요?​&n아, 아무것도 아녜요. 병장님 같은 몸매라면 분명…&n사령관님이 좋아하실 거라고… 에헤헤….​

1001407998.english: Commander… please take your time… ♥ There’s still plenty of Rhode left… Hehe… .
1001407998.korean: 사령관님… 천천히 드세요…♥​&n로데는… 아직 많이 남았어요…히힛….​

1001408080.english: From now on, it’s the real deal. You have to be gentle, just like you’re treating a real baby. Master… no, Dad? Hurry… would you like to hold Maria of Redemption in your arms?
1001408080.korean: 이제부터 정말 실전이에요,&n진짜 아기를 대하듯&n부드럽게 하는 거예요.​&n주인님… 아니, 아빠?&n어서… 마리아를 품에&n안아 보시겠어요?​

1001408084.english: Hmph... Maria of Redemption... You had an accident in your diaper again... Daddy... Can you please scold me sternly right away?
1001408084.korean: 흐응… 마리아…&n또 기저귀에 실수 했어요오…​&n아빠… 어서 엄하게&n혼내 주실 수 있으신가요?​

1001408085.english: No more... I can't take it anymore... Wah, wah... Maria of Redemption wants to be scolded really badly... ♥ Dad... please hurry up and teach this ill-mannered Maria of Redemption a lesson... !
1001408085.korean: 더… 더 이상은 못 참아…&n응애, 응애...&n마리아는 잔뜩 혼나고 싶어요오…♥​&n아빠… 어서 버릇 없는 마리아한테&n교육을 시켜주세요…!​

1001408088.english: Commander… A bear has appeared! Ta-da, it turns out it was a cute panda, P-29 Lindwurm~!
1001408088.korean: 사령관님…​&n곰이 나타났어요!​​&n짜잔, 알고 보니​&n귀여운 팬더​&n린티~! 였답니다!​

1001408092.english: Commander, please just look at P-29 Lindwurm's cuteness with your eyes!

1001408093.english: Commander, your cheeks seem really red... I'm sure this is also because of P-29 Lindwurm, right? Hmm... Commander, would you like to eat this big dumpling quickly too?
1001408093.korean: 사령관님의 볼이 엄청​&n빨개진 거 같아요…​&n이것도 당연히 린티 때문이겠죠?​​&n흐음… 사령관님♥​&n이 큰 만두도​&n빨리… 드셔 주실래요?​

1001408127.english: When Azaz saw this outfit, he tried to add various functions to my coffin. Like, if you press a button on the coffin, a nuclear weapon will fire... Huh? He also tried to add a function where Draculina and my coffin would merge to become a strategic weapon.
1001408127.korean: 이 옷을 본 아자즈가 제 관에&n여러 기능을 추가하려고 했죠.&n관에 있는 버튼을 누르면&n핵무기가 나간다 거나…&n아? 드라큐리나와 제 관이&n합체해서 전략 병기가 되는&n기능도 넣으려고 했어요.​

1001408135.english: I didn't expect to be assigned to the Doombringer. Since I've been in charge of transport for a long time, it's not exactly a stretch, though. ...But Lieutenant B-11 Night Angel is looking at me with an unusually strange gaze. I must be mistaken, right?
1001408135.korean: 제가 배속될 곳이 둠브링어가&n될 줄은 예상치 못했습니다.&n과거부터 수송 담당이었던 만큼,&n그렇게 억지는 아니지만요.​&n…그런데 나이트 앤젤 부관님이&n절 유난히 이상한 눈길로 보시는데,&n착각이겠죠?​

1001408149.english: You know, I want to have a toned, strong, and slim figure just like B-11 Night Angel. As a fellow woman, I'm so envious... Huh? Ah... I think I might have said something wrong...?
1001408149.korean: 전 말이죠,&n나이트 앤젤님처럼&n군더더기 없이 튼튼하고&n슬림한 몸매가 되고 싶어요.​&n같은 여자로서&n얼마나 부러운데요…&n네? 아… 제가&n말 실수를 한 것 같기도…?​

1001408158.english: I've decided, &n the next video I'll shoot with E-16 Talon Feather… &n Huh? Why are you suddenly grabbing your head, &n senpai?
1001408158.korean: 결정 했어,&n다음 영상은 탈론페더랑 같이 찍을…&n어? 왜 갑자기 머리를 감싸 쥐는 거야,&n선배?​

1001408318.english: My favorite older sister in Orca? Of course it's Hachiko of Castling-nee! Come to think of it, Hachiko of Castling-nee likes mint chocolate...? She asked if I liked meat pies... Is that really delicious?
1001408318.korean: 오르카에서 내가 제일 좋아하는 언니?&n당연히 하치코 언니지!&n그러고보니 하치코 언니가 민트초코…?&n미트파이 좋아 하냐고 물었는데…&n그거 정말 맛있는 거야?

1001408372.english: "Orca Resistance"—that's a terrible naming sense. Don't you have a cooler name? Like Justice Society, or bioroid Alliance... You mean Orca Resistance is better?
1001408372.korean: 오르카 저항군'이라니 네이밍 센스가 떨어지네.&n좀 더 간지나는 이름 없어?&n이를 테면 저스티스 소사이어티라던가,&n바이오로이드 얼라이언스라던가…&n오르카 저항군이 더 낫다고?

1001408379.english: The Orca commanders aren't as narrow-minded as I thought. Indomitable Marie, in particular, seems to be a good match for me. I heard she really likes children... and you know how we really connect? When I see cute kids, I... really just can't resist either...
1001408379.korean: 오르카 지휘관들도 생각보다&n그렇게 꽉 막힌 사람들은 아니더라고.&n특히 마리는 나랑 잘 맞는 것 같아.&n아이들을 많이 좋아한다던데…&n나랑 정말 말이 잘 통하는 거 있지?&n귀여운 아이들을 보면&n나도… 정말이지 참을 수가 없거든…

1001408476.english: Sowan and Audrey Dreamweaver, Aurora and Olivia Starsewer, and Taylor Clothcut all made clothes for me!
1001408476.korean: 소완과 오드리,&n아우로라와 올리비아 그리고 테일러&n모두가 나를 위해서 옷을 만들어 줬어!

1001408484.english: Taylor Clothcut said that if I wore this outfit, I should say, "Please enjoy the meal." But I'm the one enjoying the meal... Why is she asking me to eat it?
1001408484.korean: 테일러가 이 옷을 입었으면&n‘맛있게 먹어주세요’라고&n말해야 한다고 했어.&n맛있게 먹는 건 난데…&n왜 먹어달라고 하는 거지?​

1001408500.english: Corporal T-50 PX Silky gave me this, saying it was Steel Line's latest combat ration, but it's a form I've never seen before. A heating pack? Pull it and it's ready in 15 minutes? I can't understand it.
1001408500.korean: 실키 상병이 스틸라인&n최신 전투 식량이라며 주었는데&n처음 보는 형태입니다.&n발열팩? 당기고 15분이면 완성?&n이해 불능입니다.

1001408502.english: I received a lot of help from the T-3 Leprechaun squad leader. However, I was told to be careful of Private T-2 Brownie. What does that mean?
1001408502.korean: 레프리콘 분대장에게는&n많은 도움을 받았습니다.&n그런데 브라우니 일병을&n조심하라고 들었는데 무슨 뜻일까요?

1001500036.english: P/A-00 Griffon, Lindwurm, and P/A-8 Blackhound Unite!

1001500039.english: Unlocked by gifting the skin&nProject Orca: P/A-00 Griffon (for P/A-00 Griffon)
1001500039.korean: 스킨 선물하면 개방&n그리폰 용 "프로젝트 오르카: 그리폰"

1001500041.korean: 스킨 선물하면 개방&n블랙 하운드 용 "프로젝트 오르카: 블랙 하운드"

1001500042.english: Unlocked by gifting all skins&nProject Orca: P/A-00 Griffon (for P/A-00 Griffon)&nProject Orca: Lindwurm (for Lindwurm)&nProject Orca: P/A-8 Blackhound (for P/A-8 Blackhound)

1001500067.korean: 스킨 선물 하면 개방&n흐레스벨그 용 "프로젝트 오르카: 흐레스벨그"

1001500068.english: Unlocked by gifting the skin&nProject Orca: P-22 Harpyia (for P-22 Harpyia)

1001500069.english: Unlocked by gifting the skin&nProject Orca: P-49 Sleipnir (for P-49 Sleipnir)

1001500097.korean: 노랫말에 담긴 메이의 조심스러운 마음이 들리시나요?

1001500098.english: A spectacular stage prepared by B-11 Night Angel. Be careful not to fall for it!
1001500098.korean: 나이트앤젤이 준비한 멋진 무대. 반하지 않도록 조심하세요!

1001500112.english: Royal Arsenal presents a surprising stage! Get drunk on the atmosphere.
1001500112.korean: 아스널이 선사하는 반전 무대! 분위기에 취해보세요.

1001500114.english: Although he was forced to sing, CS Perrault performed amazingly. Kyukyuk!
1001500114.korean: 반강제적으로 부르게 되었지만, 페로는 기가막히게 소화했습니다. 뀨뀨!
